title: Fullstack Developer (NodeJS, Python, AI, SQL)
company: CÔNG TY TNHH CÔNG NGHỆ HAIPER-X
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Thông tin chung
- Công ty Haiper-X (Chuyên về mảng IT)
- Vị trí: Kỹ Sư AI Full-Stack 
- Địa điểm: Đường N3C, The Global City, Bình Trưng, Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh
- Thời gian làm việc: Theo lịch làm việc và chế độ nghỉ của Bộ Luật Lao Động Việt Nam
Mô tả công việc
🛠 
KỸ SƯ AI FULL-STACK
💰 Mức lương: Thỏa thuận theo năng lực (25.000.000 - 45.000.000 VND)
Cách thức ứng tuyển
CV, portfolio và link GitHub là bắt buộc. Tuy nhiên, chúng tôi sẽ đánh giá kỹ phần trả lời của các bạn cho 3 câu hỏi bên dưới hơn cả cover letter (Đây là bước lọc hồ sơ quan trọng.)
1. Một thứ bạn tự hào nhất đã làm bằng AI trong 3 tháng gần đây. (Link + 1–2 dòng mô tả)
2. Mô tả ngắn gọn về AI workflow của riêng bạn. Bạn giải quyết vấn đề gì, bằng tổ hợp công cụ nào?
 3. Có phần nào trong tin tuyển dụng này bạn không đồng ý? (Không có đáp án đúng. Hãy thành thật bày tỏ suy nghĩ của bạn.)
📁 Tiêu đề email: 
[Apply] AI Full-Stack / Họ và tên
*** Quy Trình Tuyển Dụng
 
1. Vòng hồ sơ
 (3 câu hỏi trên + portfolio + GitHub)
 
2. Soft Online Meeting
 3. Bài test kĩ thuật
Bài tập System Design + bài test coding Python cơ bản (Easy / Medium)
4. Phỏng vấn trực tiếp
 
5. Onboarding:
 Thường hoàn tất trong vòng 1 tuần. Vì công ty chúng tôi làm việc với tốc độ rất nhanh.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Yêu cầu cơ bản:
Kinh nghiệm:
 Có 3~5 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển phần mềm, tư duy full-stack nhưng có chuyên môn sâu về 
Backend
 (Node.js, Python, hoặc các ngôn ngữ server-side mạnh mẽ).
Năng lực Machine Learning:
 Có kinh nghiệm thực chiến trong việc thiết kế, xây dựng và tối ưu các pipeline ML. Thành thạo xử lý dữ liệu (data wrangling/feature engineering) cho các bài toán phân loại (classification), dự báo (forecasting) và phát hiện bất thường (anomaly detection).
Năng lực Computer Vision:
 Am hiểu về xử lý hình ảnh/video, nhận diện vật thể, trích xuất dữ liệu từ hình ảnh (OCR/Metadata extraction) và các kỹ thuật liên quan đến phân tích hành vi.
Kinh nghiệm LLM & NLP:
 Có khả năng ứng dụng các mô hình ngôn ngữ lớn (LLM) vào sản phẩm thực tế. Thành thạo Prompt Engineering, fine-tuning cơ bản, kỹ thuật RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) và xử lý đầu ra có cấu trúc (Structured Output/JSON) để tích hợp vào hệ thống backend.
Cơ sở dữ liệu:
 Nắm vững tư duy thiết kế Database (Relational DB như PostgreSQL/MySQL), tối ưu hóa truy vấn, cấu trúc index và quản lý dữ liệu hiệu quả.
Tiếng Anh:
 Trình độ Business (đọc hiểu tài liệu chuyên môn, làm việc và giao tiếp được bằng tiếng Anh).
Ưu tiên:
AI-Native:
 Đã từng phát triển sản phẩm end-to-end bằng các AI coding agent (như Claude Code / Codex / Cursor).
Kinh nghiệm triển khai:
 Đã từng đưa các hệ thống AI/ML/Agent lên môi trường production thực tế và tối ưu hiệu năng.
Tư duy hệ thống:
 Có khả năng thiết kế hệ thống backend có khả năng mở rộng (scalability) cao, giải quyết các bài toán về latency và data throughput.
Portfolio:
 Cung cấp được một dự án AI/ML/CV bạn đã tự mình launching từ 0→1.
Có khả năng giao tiếp tốt với PM và design về business.
Càng có nhiều kinh nghiệm thực hiện các dự án về ứng dụng AI thì càng được ưu tiên.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Bạn sẽ nhận được gì khi gia nhập công ty chúng tôi? 
Trải nghiệm trực tiếp launching nhiều service trong một năm. Nhiều dự án nội bộ + dự án outsourcing chạy song song.
Code và design của bạn không bị mục trong phòng chờ phê duyệt - đi thẳng lên production, có thể được đưa ra thị trường.
Trải nghiệm nhận feedback từ user thật ở thị trường toàn cầu, lấy Việt Nam làm điểm xuất phát.
Hợp tác với các CTO Hàn Quốc - mở rộng tầm nhìn kỹ thuật.
Toàn bộ lợi ích dành cho những thành viên gia nhập startup của chúng tôi từ giai đoạn sớm nhất. Hiện tại chính là “cơ hội vàng cuối cùng” để tham gia.

title: Oracle NetSuite Engineer (ERP, JavaScript) - US Market
company: Công Ty TNHH MTV Công nghệ Tin học Phúc Nguyên
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


About PN Informatics
PN Informatics Technology is a premier software outsourcing company specializing in delivering high-quality, innovative technology solutions. We specialize in software development across Web/SaaS applications, AI (Computer Vision, NLP, Generative AI), and robust enterprise architectures including CRM and ERP systems. Partnering with major software solution providers and consulting firms based in the US, we pride ourselves on driving performance, scalability, and usability for enterprise-level applications globally.
We are looking for a talented and driven 
Oracle NetSuite Engineer
 to join our growing team, working directly with our US-based clients and projects.
Job Responsibilities
System Implementation & Customization:
 Design, develop, test, and deploy customized solutions within the Oracle NetSuite ERP platform to meet specific US business workflows.
SuiteCloud Development:
 Develop and maintain SuiteScripts (1.0 & 2.x/2.1 - Client, User Event, Scheduled, Suitelet, Restlet), SuiteTalk, SuiteFlow, and SuiteBundler.
Integrations:
 Design and build secure, scalable integrations between NetSuite and third-party systems (e.g., E-commerce platforms, CRMs, 3PL logistics, banks) using REST/SOAP APIs or iPaaS platforms (Dell Boomi, Celigo, etc.).
Technical Support & Optimization:
 Troubleshooting script errors, optimizing system performance, and resolving technical bottlenecks in existing NetSuite environments.
Collaboration & Communication:
 Gather business requirements from US stakeholders, translate them into technical designs, and provide accurate estimates and technical guidance.
Reporting & Analytics:
 Build complex saved searches, financial reports, and advanced PDFs/HTML layouts.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Experience & Technical Skills
Years of Experience:
 Minimum 
3+ years
 of hands-on experience in Oracle NetSuite development and implementation.
Core Technical Skills:
 Proficient in JavaScript, SuiteScript (preferably SuiteScript 2.0/2.1), HTML, CSS, and SuiteFlow (Workflows).
ERP Knowledge:
 Strong understanding of core NetSuite modules (Order to Cash, Procure to Pay, Financials, Inventory Management, etc.).
Database & Integration:
 Solid experience with web services (REST, SOAP), JSON, XML, and data migration strategies.
Nice to have:
 NetSuite SuiteCloud Developer or SuiteCommerce certifications.
Language & Soft Skills
English Proficiency:
 
Excellent English communication skills
 (both written and verbal). You must be confident joining daily scrums, technical syncs, and text/slack communications directly with US clients.
Problem-Solving:
 Strong analytical and troubleshooting mindset, with high attention to detail.
Working Style:
 Ability to work independently in an Agile/Scrum outsourcing environment, keeping up with US time zone requirements when necessary.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Global Exposure:
 Direct experience working with dynamic US markets and enterprise-level software providers.
Advanced Tech Stack:
 Opportunities to work alongside teams specializing in AI, Deep Learning, Generative AI, and cutting-edge SaaS architectures.
Competitive Package:
 Highly competitive salary based on your skills and 13th-month bonuses.
Professional Growth:
 Structured career path, support for technical certifications, and a collaborative, tech-driven working culture.
Work-Life Balance:
 Standard working hours, premium healthcare insurance, and frequent team-building activities/annual company trips.

title: Middle UX Designer (UI-UX, Android, iOS, Mobile Apps)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Role Overview:
We are looking for a highly motivated 
Mid-Level UX Designer
 to help craft intuitive, user-centric experiences for the Motorist Super App. You will be directly involved in simplifying the car ownership journey, designing features that range from real-time traffic updates to vehicle valuation tools. You will work closely with Product Managers, Engineers, and stakeholders to deliver smart solutions that our community of drivers loves.
Key Responsibilities:
End-to-End Design
: Create user flows, wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity UI mockups for iOS, Android, and Web platforms.
User Research & Testing:
 Conduct user research, A/B testing, and usability testing with vehicle owners and dealer partners to gather actionable insights.
Cross-Functional Collaboration:
 Partner closely with developers and product managers to ensure designs are implemented accurately and function seamlessly.
Design Systems:
 Contribute to the maintenance and evolution of Motorist’s design system, ensuring visual consistency across all touchpoints.
Problem Solving:
 Challenge the status quo, iterating quickly based on user feedback and business requirements.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


2 to 3 years
 of hands-on experience in UX/UI design, with a strong focus on 
mobile applications (iOS and Android).
A solid portfolio showcasing end-to-end design processes, problem-solving skills, and clean, modern UI design.
Proficiency in industry-standard design and prototyping tools (e.g., Figma, FigJam).
Experience in conducting basic user research and translating qualitative/quantitative data into design improvements.
A team player with excellent communication skills who thrives in a fast-paced, high-growth startup environment.
Proficiency in English is required to communicate with our headquarters in Singapore.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Competitive salary with annual performance review and 13th-month bonus: 
18-30M
Modern working devices: MacBook, monitor, Android test phones, etc.
PVI Health Insurance and full social insurance as per Vietnam Labor Law.
15 days annual leave, increasing by 1 day per year.
English language training sponsored by the company.
Professional development and opportunities to travel to Singapore for training.
Friendly, innovative, and young working environment in District 2, Ho Chi Minh City.
Working hours: 7 hours/day, Monday to Friday (no weekends).
Year-end party and team-building activities.
Unlimited potential for career growth and internal advancement.

title: Senior Software Engineer (PHP / Typescript / NodeJS)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Global Fashion Group 
is the leading fashion and lifestyle destination in growth markets across LATAM, SEA and ANZ. From our people to our customers and partners, we exist to empower everyone to express their true selves through fashion. Our three e-commerce platforms: Dafiti, ZALORA and THE ICONIC connect an assortment of international, local and own brands to over 800 million consumers from diverse cultures and lifestyles. GFG’s platforms provide seamless and inspiring customer experiences from discovery to delivery, powered by art & science that is infused with unparalleled local knowledge. As part of the Group’s vision is to be the #1 online destination for fashion & lifestyle in growth markets, we are committed to doing this responsibly by being people and planet-positive across everything we do.
Since launching in 2011, THE ICONIC has redefined the future of retail in Australia and New Zealand. As the leading fashion, sports and lifestyle e-commerce destination in the region, our e-commerce platforms (Retail, Marketplace and Services) provide a seamless and  inspiring end-to-end customer experience through our own technology innovations. We stand for benchmark-setting customer service, delivery options, returns policies, and curation of brands.
We are a diverse and dynamic community of over 1,000 people working towards our purpose “To bring on the future of shopping”. THE ICONIC is people and planet-positive, and we strive towards creating a positive impact in the world by driving genuine and meaningful change for the better of all communities involved. 
 
THE TEAM
At GFG, Technology is core to long-term success and is a crucial enabler of a great Customer Experience. We are a mix of experts in fashion, logistics, data analytics, marketing, and design, guided by business consultants and tech geniuses – everyone contributes to the success of GFG.
Our Engineering Department plans, builds and maintains the technology that drives high traffic ecommerce platforms. Our ability to deliver fast, safe and scalable solutions is critical in delivering first-class experiences to our customers. Our teams are organized by business domain and take ownership of everything they do in a you built it, you own it, model.
 
SCOPE OF ROLE
Write and maintain clean and well-tested code
Deploy micro-services using infrastructure as code technologies, CI/CD, Terraform
Work on distributed systems at scale with high-traffic workloads
Collaborate with other software engineers and stakeholders in your team to build and maintain APIs in our microservices architecture (Kubernetes)

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


WHAT IT TAKES
Fluent English (written and verbal) — you'll present solutions and collaborate across timezones
Proficiency in backend development (NodeJS and Typescript are preferable). Having experience with PHP or willing to work with PHP is a plus.
Experience in designing and building highly scalable applications and microservices.
Understanding of unit testing and related testing frameworks
Familiarity with agile and lean software engineering
Understanding of fundamental engineering concepts - SOLID principles, clean code, design patterns, testing
Awareness of major cloud provider (AWS, GCP or Azure)
Familiarity with RDBMS and NoSQL databases
Ways to stand out from the crowd
Exposure to building high traffic and scalable solutions
Exposure to modern DevOps practices - QA Automation, Monitoring, Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform), CI/CD…

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


At GFG, you will be part of an international tech environment where your work has real impact across multiple markets and millions of customers.
 
We offer:
The unique opportunity to have a serious impact on a growing organisation
A dynamic working environment shaping the face of fashion e-commerce in growth markets
Work closely with a global talent pool with international mindset 
Best practice scaled agile engineering
Amazing office and great culture! Massage chairs, table tennis, video game room, quarterly team events, yearly company trip, end of the year party
Hybrid working environment and work from home set up allowance
Clear career progression plan and support
Macbook or laptop when you start
Social insurance, medical insurance & health insurance
13th month salary
15 days of annual leave, 30 days of sick leave/mental health, 1 day of occasion leave
Join Us
If you are excited about building technology at scale, working in an international environment and contributing to one of the leading fashion and lifestyle e-commerce groups in growth markets, we would love to hear from you.

title: Android Developer (Middle - Senior) - Up to $3000
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


About Ingenico
Ingenico is the global leader in payment acceptance and services. We support our customers, and their customers, to do more with payments. Active in 37 countries with over 3,500 employees, we have been at the forefront of the commerce landscape for over four decades. With more than 40 million payment devices deployed worldwide, powered by over 2,500 apps, Ingenico serves the needs of millions of consumers every day. Through our advanced integrated solutions and network of partnerships, we simplify the world of payments and bring value-added services to move commerce forward.
We have an exciting opportunity to join our team. You will be part of a dynamic and innovative culture where new ideas are encouraged and collaboration is key.
 
About the Role
We are looking for a 
Senior Android Developer
 to join our 
Android Competence Center
. In this role, you will lead software development within a small team, guide engineers on best practices and code quality, and work closely with cross-functional stakeholders to plan feature integration and deliver high-quality Android solutions used across multiple regions.
 
This is a 
full-time, permanent
 role based in 
Hanoi, Vietnam
.
 
What You Will Do
Lead software development activities within a small team of developers
Manage team workload to ensure tasks are well planned and delivered on time
Partner with the Mainline Manager to plan feature branches and integration
Provide technical guidance to team members on software engineering best practices
Conduct and support code reviews to maintain strong internal quality standards
Collaborate with the Agile Project Lead on scope analysis and workload estimation
Work closely with QA teams to improve unit test coverage and support interim releases
Contribute to software analysis, design, and architecture decisions
Help ensure technical deliverables meet quality expectations and project commitments
Support a collaborative, learning-focused engineering culture

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Must Have
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or a related field
3–8 years of software development experience
Strong experience in Android development, with the ability to mentor and guide others
Proficiency in 
Kotlin
 or 
Java
Experience in software analysis, design, and architecture
Strong capability in requirement analysis and workload estimation
Experience leading or coordinating a small development team
Familiarity with development management tools such as 
Git, Jira, and Jenkins
Good communication skills in English
A collaborative, open-minded approach with a willingness to share knowledge and support teammates
Nice to Have
Experience with 
Python
Experience in testing tools such as 
Appium
 or 
Robot Framework
Experience using 
Docker
Fast learner with a strong interest in new tools and technologies

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Work life balance, no OT, 15 days off
Chance to go onsite/other countries for training
Attractive benefits:
Great salary package, annual performance review 
Performance bonus 
Full salary in probation 
Social insurance on full salary from probation 
Premium Health insurance covering for employees, lawful spouse, and unlimited number of children from probation 
15 days off annually, paid sick leaves, annual Heath Check-up 
Working from Monday – Friday, from 9AM to 6PM, no OT 
Annual company trip, quarterly team building activities, weekly Happy Hour 
English communication skill training 
Equipment: Laptop, monitor 
Free coffee and snack

title: Fullstack Developer (Java, Spring, ReactJS) - 2V069
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Phát triển Hệ thống: 
Thiết kế và triển khai các dịch vụ Microservices hiệu năng cao phía Backend và giao diện người dùng (UI/UX) hiện đại phía Frontend.
Tối ưu hóa & Bảo mật:
 Quản lý giao dịch (transaction management) chặt chẽ, thiết lập cơ chế bảo mật API chuyên sâu (OAuth, RBAC) và tối ưu hóa tốc độ rendering phía Client.
Xây dựng Kiến trúc:
 Áp dụng kiến trúc hướng sự kiện (Event-driven) sử dụng Kafka hoặc SQS; đồng thời xây dựng các Single Page Applications (SPA) có khả năng mở rộng tốt.
Tích hợp End-to-End:
 Đảm bảo sự kết nối mượt mà giữa logic nghiệp vụ Backend và trải nghiệm người dùng Frontend thông qua RESTful APIs.
Vận hành & Troubleshooting:
 Chẩn đoán, truy vết và xử lý triệt để các sự cố trên toàn bộ Stack (từ Browser đến Database) trên môi trường Production.
Quy trình Agile:
 Tham gia chặt chẽ vào quy trình Agile/Scrum, phối hợp với đội ngũ UI/UX và Business Analyst để bàn giao sản phẩm chất lượng qua từng Sprint

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Kinh nghiệm:
 Ít nhất 
5+ năm kinh nghiệm
 phát triển phần mềm, 2+ năm kinh nghiệm với vị trí Fullstack developer với Java và các Javascript Framework hiện đại.
Backend Mastery: 
Thành thạo Java Core (OOP, Concurrency, Collections). Kinh nghiệm vững chắc về Spring Boot, Spring Data và Dependency Injection.
Frontend Mastery:
 Thành thạo React.js (hoặc Angular). Nắm vững TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3 (SASS/SCSS) và thiết kế Responsive.
State Management: 
Có kinh nghiệm quản lý trạng thái ứng dụng với Redux, Context API hoặc Zustand. Ưu tiên ứng viên biết sử dụng UI Libraries như Ant Design hoặc Tailwind CSS.
Microservices & Data:
 Kinh nghiệm thiết kế RESTful Microservices, hệ thống hướng sự kiện (Kafka) và thành thạo SQL (PostgreSQL, Oracle) cùng NoSQL (Redis, MongoDB).
Cloud & DevOps: 
Hiểu biết về AWS (EC2, EKS, Lambda), Docker/Kubernetes (K8s) và quy trình CI/CD (Jenkins, Harness).
Công cụ:
 Thành thạo Git và các công cụ giám sát, chẩn đoán hệ thống (Grafana, ELK, Chrome DevTools).

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Làm việc trong các dự án chuyển đổi số mang tính CHIẾN LƯỢC & TIÊN PHONG của Tập đoàn với dạng ngành nghề, mảng công việc, có nhiều hướng lựa chọn phát triển chuyên môn...
Gói thu nhập từ 14 đến 16 tháng lương/năm (có thưởng dự án tùy với vị trí đặc thù). Nhận mức offer cạnh tranh nếu có năng lực vượt trội.
Nhiều chương trình đào tạo nâng cao kỹ năng, năng lực chuyên môn. Được tham gia chương trình Lãnh đạo kế cận khi nhiều năm có hiệu suất năm việc tốt.
Chế độ phúc lợi hấp dẫn: Nghỉ ngày sinh nhật, nghỉ mát định kỳ, giờ làm việc linh hoạt, gói Bảo hiểm sức khỏe cao cấp – TNG care…
Làm việc tại một trong những môi trường làm việc tốt nhất Châu Á (theo HR Asia Awards) với văn phòng đẹp, trang thiết bị hiện đại, văn hóa gắn kết cùng phương pháp làm việc Agile/ mô hình Scrum.

title: Javascript Intern
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


We are looking for a motivated and passionate JavaScript Developer Intern to join our development team. This role is ideal for someone eager to gain hands-on experience in JavaScript development and learn from experienced developers in a dynamic environment.
 
Responsibilities: 
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and maintain web applications.
Participate in the full software development lifecycle, including requirements gathering, design, coding, testing, and deployment.
Develop and maintain software applications using JavaScript.
Assist with the implementation of new technology and IT projects.
Communicate effectively with international team members in English, including documenting code and processes clearly.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Requirements:
Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal) to collaborate effectively in an international environment..
Basic understanding of JavaScript and TypeScript for building simple applications.
Has basic experience with at least one popular JavaScript framework or library like React, React Native, or Node.js.
Strong willingness to learn and adapt to new technologies and development tools.
Good problem-solving and analytical thinking skills.
Basic understanding of Git or other version control systems.
 
Nice-to-Haves:
Basic understanding or hands-on experience with Docker for containerization and deployment.
Familiarity with RESTful APIs and integration between front-end and back-end systems.
Knowledge of databases such as PostgreSQL or MySQL, including basic CRUD operations.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


8seneca is committed to building a workplace where employees can grow, contribute, and thrive.
1. Engaging perks and benefits for your well-being
We offer a competitive package including 13th-month salary, on-time salary payments, and project bonuses based on revenue. Employees are fully covered with 100% salary-based insurance, advanced healthcare insurance, annual health check-ups, and Tet/holiday gifts.
Work-life balance is supported with 14 days annual leave plus 3 Christmas days, flexible working arrangements (3 days WFH for senior lever up), modern office facilities, team-building trips (4D3N at 5-star resorts), and wellness support such as vitamins in the office. In addition, the office provides coffee machines, snacks, and fresh fruits to support daily comfort and energy.
2. World-class technology and impactful projects
You will work with modern technologies in AI, Data, Cloud, and Software Engineering on large-scale international projects for European clients, including strategic initiatives for our company—one of the top IT companies in Europe. We also provide access to modern AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude Code to support productivity and engineering excellence.
3. A culture of growth, collaboration, and learning
We foster continuous learning through mentorship programs, 1-1 feedback, and performance reviews. Employees are empowered to take ownership, make decisions, and learn from mistakes in a safe, supportive environment. A shared company library also promotes continuous self-development.
At 8seneca, you will work with talented people from diverse backgrounds, united by a passion for technology and innovation.

title: Senior Java Backend Developer
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


We are looking for a 
passionate and detail-oriented Senior Java Developer
 to join our team for a high-impact project in the 
banking and financial sector
. This is an exciting opportunity to work on 
cutting-edge financial technologies
 and contribute to the 
stability, scalability, and performance
 of mission-critical systems.
Job Description
Develop and maintain web applications & backend systems using Java and related frameworks.
Work with Client’s designers and product owners to deliver production-ready source code based upon assigned features and requirements. 
Collaborate with project teams on business requirement, analysis, design, development, and testing of the applications in support of business solutions, recommends solutions that are aligned with business needs.
Design and manage databases, optimize queries, and handle data processing.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Job Requirements:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science/IT or related field
5+ years of experience
 in web/backend development with 
Java technologies
 (Spring Boot, Spring MVC, JPA/Hibernate).
Strong knowledge of 
PL/SQL
 and 
Oracle Database
.

title: Senior/Lead Engineer (React Native, ReactJS, ≥5yoe)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


About the role
We're building the 
YUM! SuperApp
 — the platform that powers day-to-day operations across 
29,500+ restaurants worldwide
 (KFC, Pizza Hut, Taco Bell, The Habit Burger & Grill). It's high-scale, mission-critical, and used by restaurant teams globally every single day. And it keeps growing fast.
 
We're looking for a 
Senior Software Engineer
 who lives and breathes React Native and knows when to drop into native code. You'll own real chunks of the mobile experience end to end — from architecture, to release, to the production issue at 4pm on a Friday. There's plenty of room to shape how the team works and help other engineers grow, but make no mistake: this is a hands-on building role first.
 
We work 
AI-native
. We expect you to drive product outcomes with AI assistants and MCP-connected workflows — 
Claude, Claude Code, Figma Make
, and the rest — not just to write code faster, but to prototype, design, and ship better. If you already build this way (or you're itching to), you'll feel right at home.
 
What you'll do
Build, ship, and own
 scalable React Native features across iOS and Android — with quality, performance, and reliability baked in from the start.
Design and drive 
scalable frontend architecture
 — set the patterns, structure, and conventions that let the app (and the team) grow without grinding to a halt.
Contribute to our 
ReactJS web app
, keeping architecture and design patterns consistent across mobile and web.
Work closely with backend engineers, designers, and product managers to turn product ideas into things people actually use.
Own what you ship 
after
 release — proactively catch and fix production issues using Sentry, Crashlytics, Datadog, and similar tools.
Drive 
performance
: faster startup, smoother lists, smaller bundles, fewer crashes — on real devices, including the older Androids.
Use 
AI to drive outcomes
, not just to type faster — lean on Claude, Claude Code, Figma Make, and MCP servers to go from idea to working prototype to shipped feature. We want you pushing these tools hard and sharing what works back to the team.
Bring your point of view to technical planning, architecture discussions, and code reviews.
Be a 
go-to resource for less-experienced engineers
 — raise the team's bar through code reviews, pairing, and sharing what you know.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


5+ years
 building frontend apps (React Native + ReactJS), with 
React Native as your core strength
.
A track record of shipping 
and maintaining
 large-scale production apps.
Proven ability to 
create and drive scalable frontend architectures
 — you've designed structure and patterns that held up as apps and teams grew.
Strong 
TypeScript
, plus a real understanding of React Native internals, performance tuning, and debugging.
Comfortable making state-management trade-offs (Redux / Zustand / React Query) 
and explaining why
.
Hands-on with monitoring and observability tools (Sentry, Datadog, Crashlytics).
Familiar with native code (Java / Kotlin / Swift / Obj-C) and mobile build pipelines.
Genuinely good with 
AI dev tools
 (Claude, Claude Code, Figma Make, Copilot/Cursor, MCP) — you use them daily and you have a point of view on where they help and where they don't.
Experience 
mentoring and coaching other engineers
 — you're someone teammates come to, and you lift the people around you. (This is a core part of the role, not a bonus — but it's about being a technical resource, not managing people.)
Solid communication in 
English
 — you can collaborate across timezones and explain technical decisions clearly.
 
What you'll get to learn here
You don't need all of this on day one. This is the runway — what you'll pick up and grow into with us.
Own 
CI/CD and cloud infra
 end to end (AWS, Firebase, fastlane, EAS).
Go deep on 
authentication & security
 (OAuth, JWT, Cognito, Firebase Auth).
Work with 
monorepo tooling
 at scale (Nx, Turborepo).
Help shape and govern our 
design system
.
Level up 
testing
 — from unit to E2E (Detox, Cypress, Maestro).
Grow toward 
Staff-level scope
 — owning larger technical initiatives end to end as you progress (the IC track here goes all the way up; management is a choice, not the only path).

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Attractive Benefits:
100% salary during probation period
Annual Leave: 18 days/ year
Five “Recharge Days” – Extra days, in addition to company holidays.
Flexible Friday afternoon
Full salary insurance
13th-month bonus
Gift + 1 day off for birthday
Advanced health insurance (Generali)
Regular engagement activities: sport clubs, internal event…
Support Macbook and Monitor

title: Frontend Developer (ReactJS/ TypeScript/ Graphql)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Chúng tôi là 
 đang xây dựng nền tảng E-commerce, phục vụ các nghiệp vụ quản lý sản phẩm, đơn hàng, khách hàng và vận hành hệ thống.

Làm việc với GraphQL query / mutation / pagination / filter / sort
Quản lý server state bằng React Query (cache, invalidate, loading/error state)
Chuẩn hoá pattern cho table, form, dialog

Phát triển UI dựa trên Tailwind CSS và design token từ Figma

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience

Có từ 
2 năm kinh nghiệm

Đã từng tự khởi tạo hoặc tham gia setup project React + TypeScript.

Generics.
Union / intersection types.
Type narrowing.

Hiểu quản lý state frontend, đặc biệt là server state/client state; đã từng dùng React Query, Zustand hoặc công cụ tương đương.
Có kinh nghiệm xây dựng UI bằng Tailwind CSS trong dự án thực tế.
Có khả năng đọc, phân tích và refactor codebase React + TypeScript hiện có.
Có tư duy code rõ ràng, dễ maintain, phù hợp với team product.
CỘNG ĐIỂM:
Đã từng xây dựng Admin Dashboard / E-commerce từ giai đoạn đầu
Biết Shadcn / Radix UI hoặc component library tương tự
Biết thiết lập design token / system từ Figma
Có kinh nghiệm xử lý permission / role trong UI
Có tư duy sản phẩm, chú trọng UX consistency và chi tiết.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Làm sản phẩm E-commerce thực tế, domain phức tạp
Làm việc trực tiếp với Founder
Có lộ trình phát triển lên Quản lý dự án hoặc Full-Stack engineer

Tham gia Team bonding, hoạt động sinh nhật hằng tháng
Pantry đầy đủ trà, cà phê, đồ ăn nhẹ

title: Senior Android Engineer
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Get to Know the Team
Come join the Communications Engineering team! The Interactive Comms team at Grab revolutionizes how people connect and communicate on the Grab platform, spanning multiple Apps and Web. We are on an exciting mission to shape the future of communications as our platform evolves, weaving social interactions, groups and more.
Get to Know the Role
You will manage the Android engineering surface for Grab's Interactive Communications products — real-time chat, VoIP calling, and number masking. You'll work across the full mobile lifecycle: architecture decisions, feature delivery, SDK integrations, and production stability. You will report to the Engineering Manager
 
This is a senior IC role where you'll be expected to lead system design for Android, mentor mid-level engineers, and partner closely with product, design, QA, and backend teams to ship high-quality features that connect millions of passengers, drivers, and merchants daily. This role will be onsite in HCMC
The Critical Tasks You Will Perform
Design Android applications using Kotlin and Java, following best practices and architectural patterns
Implement user interfaces following Material Design principles and ensure user experience across several devices and screen sizes
Integrate RESTful APIs and backend services, ensuring efficient data communication and synchronization
Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code with comprehensive unit and integration tests using frameworks such as JUnit, Espresso, and Mockito
Optimize application performance, identify bottlenecks, and implement solutions to enhance speed and efficiency
Conduct code reviews and provide constructive feedback to team members, encouraging a culture of continuous improvement
Troubleshoot and debug complex issues, using analytical skills to identify causes and implement solutions
Collaborate with product managers, designers, and backend engineers to translate requirements into technical specifications
Stay current with Android ecosystem developments, new technologies, and industry best practices
Participate in Agile ceremonies and contribute to sprint planning, estimation, and retrospectives
Mentor junior developers and support their professional growth through guidance and knowledge sharing

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


What Essential Skills You Will Need
5+ years of professional Android development experience with experience with shipping production applications
Advanced proficiency in Kotlin and Java programming languages
Experience with Android SDK, lifecycle management, and modern architecture components (MVVM, MVP, Clean Architecture)
Solid experience with RESTful API integration and backend service usage
Proficiency with version control systems, Git
Demonstrated expertise in implementing responsive UI/UX designs and Material Design principles
Experience with testing frameworks and a commitment to writing testable, maintainable code
Experience approaching a problem from different angles, analyzing pros and cons of different solutions w
Experience reviewing code to find and address potential issues and defects
Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments
Experience communicating updates and resolutions to customers and other partners with the ability to collaborate across team
Experience with Jetpack libraries and modern Android development frameworks
Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and automated testing practices
Familiarity with third-party libraries and dependency management tools
Understanding of mobile security best practices and secure coding principles
Contributions to open-source Android projects

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Life at Grab
We care about your well-being at Grab, here are some of the global benefits we offer:
We have your back with 
Term Life Insurance 
and comprehensive 
Medical Insurance.
With 
GrabFlex, 
create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations.
Celebrate moments that matter in life with loved ones through 
Parental
 and 
Birthday leave
, and give back to your communities through 
Love-all-Serve-all (LASA)
 volunteering leave
We have a confidential 
Grabber Assistance Programme
 to guide and uplift you and your loved ones through life's challenges.
What we stand for at Grab
We are committed to building an inclusive and equitable workplace that enables diverse Grabbers to grow and perform at their best. As an equal opportunity employer, we consider all candidates fairly and equally regardless of nationality, ethnicity, religion, age, gender identity, sexual orientation, family commitments, physical and mental impairments or disabilities, and other attributes that make them unique.

title: Tech Lead (MDM, Golang, Java, IOS)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


1. THÔNG TIN CHUNG / GENERAL INFORMATION
Tên vị trí / Position:        Tech Lead
Phòng ban / Department:        Kỹ thuật (Engineering)
Báo cáo cho / Report to:        Engineering Manager / CTO
Số lượng / Headcount:        1-2
Cấp bậc / Level:        Tech Lead
2. MỤC TIÊU CÔNG VIỆC / JOB PURPOSE
Dẫn dắt đội ngũ kỹ thuật phát triển sản phẩm MDM, định hướng kiến trúc hệ thống và lựa chọn công nghệ. Chịu trách nhiệm về chất lượng, hiệu năng, bảo mật của toàn bộ sản phẩm; hướng dẫn, đào tạo đội ngũ và đảm bảo tiến độ giao hàng. Đóng vai trò chủ chốt trong việc xây dựng sản phẩm MDM cạnh tranh tại thị trường Việt Nam và khu vực.
Lead the engineering team in developing MDM products, drive architectural decisions and technology choices. Own the quality, performance, and security of the entire product; mentor team members and ensure on-time delivery. Play a key role in building a competitive MDM product for the Vietnamese and regional markets.
3. TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH / KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
Thiết kế kiến trúc tổng thể (high-level & low-level design) cho hệ thống MDM: backend services, admin console, mobile agent.
Design high-level and low-level architecture for the entire MDM system: backend services, admin console, and mobile agent.
Định hướng lựa chọn công nghệ, framework, thư viện cho từng module; ra quyết định build vs buy.
Drive technology, framework, and library selection across modules; make build-vs-buy decisions.
Dẫn dắt đội 4-8 developer: phân chia công việc, mentor, code review, đánh giá hiệu suất.
Lead a team of 4–8 developers: task allocation, mentoring, code review, and performance evaluation.
Chịu trách nhiệm cuối cùng về chất lượng code, kiến trúc bảo mật và hiệu năng hệ thống.
Ultimately responsible for code quality, security architecture, and overall system performance.\
Thiết kế và rà soát các luồng bảo mật cốt lõi: enrollment, attestation, key provisioning, certificate lifecycle, secure OTA.
Design and review core security flows: enrollment, attestation, key provisioning, certificate lifecycle, and secure OTA.\
Làm việc trực tiếp với Product Manager, Security Team, DevOps để phân tích yêu cầu, ước lượng và lập kế hoạch sprint/release.
Collaborate directly with Product Managers, Security Team, and DevOps on requirement analysis, estimation, and sprint/release planning.
Xây dựng và duy trì coding standards, branching strategy, CI/CD pipeline, quy trình release.
Establish and maintain coding standards, branching strategy, CI/CD pipelines, and release processes.
Phân tích sự cố production nghiêm trọng, dẫn dắt root cause analysis và đề xuất giải pháp dài hạn.
Triage major production incidents, lead root cause analysis, and propose long-term fixes.
Đại diện kỹ thuật làm việc với khách hàng lớn, đối tác, nhà cung cấp HSM/PKI khi cần.
Act as the technical representative with key clients, partners, and HSM/PKI vendors when needed.
Theo dõi xu hướng công nghệ (Android Enterprise, Apple Business Manager, Zero Trust, PQC) và đưa ra lộ trình áp dụng.
Track technology trends (Android Enterprise, Apple Business Manager, Zero Trust, PQC) and propose adoption roadmaps.
Đào tạo nội bộ, nâng cấp kiến thức bảo mật và kỹ năng cho team.
Conduct internal training to upskill the team in security and engineering best practices.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


4. YÊU CẦU / REQUIREMENTS
4.1. Học vấn / Education
Cử nhân/Thạc sĩ CNTT, Khoa học máy tính, An toàn thông tin hoặc tương đương. Các chứng chỉ liên quan (CISSP, CEH, AWS, GCP) là một lợi thế.
Bachelor's or Master's degree in IT, Computer Science, Information Security, or equivalent. Relevant certifications (CISSP, CEH, AWS, GCP) are a plus.
4.2. Kinh nghiệm / Experience
Tối thiểu 6-8 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển phần mềm, trong đó có ít nhất 2 năm ở vai trò Tech Lead hoặc tương đương. Có kinh nghiệm dẫn dắt team ≥ 4 người và đã đưa ít nhất một sản phẩm bảo mật/mobile/MDM ra production.
At least 6–8 years of software development experience, including 2+ years as a Tech Lead or equivalent. Proven experience leading a team of 4+ engineers and shipping at least one security/mobile/MDM product to production.
4.3. Kỹ năng kỹ thuật / Technical Skills
a) Phát triển phần mềm / Software Development
Backend:
 Chuyên sâu Golang/Java, microservices, message queue (Kafka/RabbitMQ/NATS), gRPC, RESTful API, SQL/NoSQL, caching, distributed systems.
Frontend:
 Hiểu sâu React.js/Vue.js, TypeScript, state management, performance optimization; có khả năng review code và định hướng kiến trúc UI.
Mobile:
 Thành thạo Android (Kotlin) và/hoặc iOS (Swift); hiểu rõ Android Enterprise (Device Owner, Profile Owner, Work Profile) và Apple MDM protocol (DEP, VPP, ABM, ASM).
Cloud & Infra:
 AWS/GCP/Azure ở mức kiến trúc; Kubernetes, Terraform, observability stack (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, OpenTelemetry).
DevSecOps:
 CI/CD nâng cao, SAST/DAST/SCA, secret management, supply chain security (SLSA, SBOM).
Phương pháp:
 Agile/Scrum, system design, architectural decision records (ADR), threat modeling (STRIDE, PASTA).
b) Bảo mật phần cứng & Trusted Execution / Hardware Security & Trusted Execution
Hiểu sâu và có khả năng thiết kế giải pháp khai thác các chip/môi trường bảo mật trên thiết bị; có thể đánh giá rủi ro và đưa ra lựa chọn kiến trúc phù hợp:
Deep expertise in on-device security chips/environments with the ability to architect, evaluate trade-offs, and make sound design choices:
Apple Secure Enclave (SEP):
 kiến trúc SEP, lifecycle khóa qua kSecAttrTokenIDSecureEnclave, biometric-bound keys, DataProtection classes, Keychain ACL; thiết kế các tính năng MDM khai thác SEP cho Apple devices.
Architect SEP-based features: key lifecycle, biometric-bound keys, DataProtection classes, and Keychain ACLs across the MDM stack on Apple devices.
Android StrongBox & TEE:
 Android Keystore với StrongBox, phân biệt software/TEE/StrongBox-backed keys, ID/Key Attestation, Verified Boot state; đánh giá tương thích trên dải thiết bị OEM khác nhau.
Design StrongBox/TEE-based features, perform key/ID attestation, and assess compatibility across OEM device fleets.
TPM 2.0:
 PCR, sealed storage, remote attestation, EK/AIK certificates; thiết kế desktop MDM agent và mô hình device identity dựa trên TPM.
Architect desktop MDM agents and TPM-based device identity using PCRs, sealed storage, and EK/AIK certificates.
HSM & Cloud KMS:
 thiết kế và vận hành hệ thống quản lý khóa với HSM on-prem (Thales, Utimaco) hoặc cloud KMS (AWS KMS/CloudHSM, GCP KMS, Azure Key Vault) qua PKCS#11/KMIP; lập kế hoạch high availability, disaster recovery cho key material.
Architect key management with on-prem HSMs or cloud KMS via PKCS#11/KMIP; plan HA/DR for cryptographic key material.
Mô hình tin cậy phân tầng: 
Root of Trust → Secure Boot → Verified Boot → Attestation; thiết kế cơ chế kiểm tra tính toàn vẹn của fleet thiết bị, xử lý tampered/rooted/jailbroken devices.
Design integrity verification across the device fleet and handle tampered/rooted/jailbroken endpoints.
c) Mã hoá & Mật mã học ứng dụng / Cryptography & Applied Cryptography
Có khả năng đưa ra quyết định mật mã ở cấp độ kiến trúc, lựa chọn nguyên hàm phù hợp và rà soát code/cấu hình của team:
Able to make cryptographic decisions at the architectural level, select appropriate primitives, and review the team's implementations and configurations:
Mã hoá đối xứng: 
AES-GCM/GCM-SIV/CBC/CTR, ChaCha20-Poly1305; nắm chắc nonce management, AEAD design, padding oracle, timing attacks.
AES-GCM/GCM-SIV/CBC/CTR, ChaCha20-Poly1305; mastery of nonce management, AEAD design, padding oracle, and timing attacks.
Mã hoá bất đối xứng:
 RSA (PKCS#1 v1.5, OAEP, PSS) ≥ 2048-bit, hiểu rõ pitfalls; có thể tư vấn migration plan từ RSA sang ECC.
RSA (PKCS#1 v1.5, OAEP, PSS) ≥ 2048 bits with deep understanding of pitfalls; able to advise on migration from RSA to ECC.
Elliptic Curve:
 ECDSA, EdDSA (Ed25519), ECDH/X25519, NIST P-256/P-384, Curve25519; chọn đúng curve theo ngữ cảnh mobile, IoT, server.
ECDSA, EdDSA (Ed25519), ECDH/X25519 across NIST and Curve25519 families; pick curves appropriate to mobile, IoT, or server contexts.
Hash, MAC, KDF:
 SHA-2/3, BLAKE2/3, HMAC, HKDF, PBKDF2, Argon2, scrypt; thiết kế đúng KDF cho từng use case (password, key derivation, session keys).
SHA-2/3, BLAKE2/3, HMAC, and KDFs (HKDF, PBKDF2, Argon2, scrypt) with correct selection per use case.
Mật mã hậu lượng tử (PQC):
 hiểu ML-KEM (Kyber), ML-DSA (Dilithium), hybrid schemes; có thể xây dựng PQC roadmap cho sản phẩm MDM.
Understand ML-KEM (Kyber), ML-DSA (Dilithium), hybrid schemes, and build a PQC roadmap for the MDM product.
Thư viện chuẩn: 
Tink, libsodium, BoringSSL, BouncyCastle, JCA/JCE, CryptoKit; nghiêm cấm và rà soát các trường hợp tự cài đặt thuật toán trong team.
Mandate well-vetted libraries (Tink, libsodium, BoringSSL, BouncyCastle, JCA/JCE, CryptoKit) and audit against custom cryptography.
d) Mã hoá dữ liệu & Chữ ký số / Data Encryption & Digital Signatures
Thiết kế và sở hữu kiến trúc bảo vệ dữ liệu end-to-end trong toàn bộ hệ thống MDM:
Own the end-to-end data protection architecture across the entire MDM system:
Encryption at rest:
 FDE, FBE (Android), FileVault/APFS, envelope encryption (DEK/KEK), AES-KW (RFC 5649); thiết kế chiến lược lưu trữ và xoay vòng khóa.
FDE, FBE (Android), FileVault/APFS, envelope encryption (DEK/KEK), AES-KW; design key storage and rotation strategy.
Encryption in transit:
 TLS 1.2/1.3, mTLS server↔agent, certificate pinning, OCSP stapling, HSTS; thiết kế phòng thủ trước downgrade, MITM, BEAST, CRIME.
TLS 1.2/1.3, mTLS server↔agent, certificate pinning, OCSP stapling, HSTS; design defenses against downgrade, MITM, BEAST, and CRIME.
PKI & quản lý chứng thư số: 
X.509, CSR, chain validation, OCSP/CRL, SCEP, EST, ACME; thiết kế và vận hành internal CA cho MDM enrollment ở quy mô fleet lớn.
Design and operate an internal CA for MDM enrollment at fleet scale.
Chữ ký số:
 ký command/policy server→agent, firmware/OTA, APK/IPA signing & verification, timestamping (RFC 3161), JWT/JWS/JWE/COSE.
Sign commands/policies, firmware/OTA, APK/IPA, with timestamping and JWT/JWS/JWE/COSE for API authentication.
Key management lifecycle
: generation, distribution, rotation, revocation, escrow, destruction; tách bạch signing/encryption keys; tuân thủ NIST SP 800-57.
Full key lifecycle with separation of signing and encryption keys, in line with NIST SP 800-57.
Secure channels & protocols:
 Noise, Signal Protocol, Double Ratchet cho secure messaging server↔agent khi cần.
Noise, Signal Protocol, Double Ratchet for secure server↔agent messaging when required.
Threat modeling & secure SDLC:
 STRIDE, LINDDUN, abuse cases; xây dựng quy trình review bảo mật cho từng tính năng.
Embed STRIDE/LINDDUN/abuse-case threat modeling into the SDLC for every feature.
Hiểu sâu các tiêu chuẩn & chứng nhận: FIPS 140-2/140-3, Common Criteria, NIST SP 800-series, ISO 27001, SOC 2, và quy định mật mã Việt Nam (Nghị định 53/2022/NĐ-CP, tiêu chuẩn của Ban Cơ yếu Chính phủ). Có khả năng dẫn dắt team đạt các chứng nhận này.
In-depth knowledge of FIPS 140-2/140-3, Common Criteria, NIST SP 800-series, ISO 27001, SOC 2, and Vietnamese cryptographic regulations; able to lead the team toward these certifications.
4.4. Kỹ năng mềm / Soft Skills
Lãnh đạo và truyền cảm hứng cho team kỹ thuật.
Leadership and ability to inspire an engineering team.
Tư duy hệ thống, ra quyết định dựa trên dữ liệu và rủi ro.
Systems thinking with data- and risk-driven decision making.
Giao tiếp tốt với cả stakeholder kỹ thuật và phi kỹ thuật.
Effective communication with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Tư duy bảo mật (security mindset) ở mức kiến trúc; luôn đặt câu hỏi "kẻ tấn công sẽ làm gì?".
Architectural-level security mindset — always asking "what would an attacker do?"
Kỹ năng mentor, đào tạo và phát triển đội ngũ.
Strong mentoring, training, and team development skills.
Tiếng Anh đọc/viết tốt; giao tiếp với đối tác nước ngoài là một lợi thế.
Strong written English; spoken English with foreign partners is a plus.
5. KPI ĐO LƯỜNG HIỆU QUẢ / KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS
KPI 1:
 Đảm bảo ≥ 90% sprint goals của team đạt được theo cam kết.
Ensure ≥ 90% of team sprint goals are met as committed.
KPI 2:
 Code coverage trung bình của team ≥ 80%; không có vùng critical < 70%.
Team-wide code coverage ≥ 80%; no critical module below 70%.
KPI 3:
 Số production incident nghiêm trọng (Sev-1/Sev-2) ≤ 2/quý.
≤ 2 Sev-1/Sev-2 production incidents per quarter.
KPI 4:
 Không có lỗ hổng Critical/High trên sản phẩm MDM khi pentest định kỳ.
Zero Critical/High vulnerabilities in MDM products during periodic pentests.
KPI 5:
 ≥ 2 thành viên trong team được promote hoặc đạt mục tiêu phát triển nghề nghiệp/năm.
≥ 2 team members promoted or hitting career goals per year.
KPI 6: 
Hoàn thành đúng hạn các milestone kiến trúc, security audit, certification theo roadmap.
Deliver architecture milestones, security audits, and certifications on the roadmap.
6. CÔNG CỤ SỬ DỤNG / TOOLSTACK
Cursor Pro + GitHub Copilot, Claude Pro, GitHub Team, Jira, Postman, Docker, BrowserStack, Figma.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


7. QUYỀN LỢI / BENEFITS
Lương / Salary: 
Từ 60.000.000 – 90.000.000 đồng (thoả thuận theo năng lực).
VND 60,000,000 – 90,000,000 (negotiable based on capability).
Đóng đầy đủ BHXH – BHYT – BHTN trên mức lương.
Full Social, Health, and Unemployment Insurance.
Lương tháng 13, thưởng Tết, thưởng dự án, hưởng theo hiệu quả công việc và milestone sản phẩm.
3th-month salary, Tet bonus, project bonuses, performance-based bonuses, and product milestone rewards.
Ngân sách học tập và đào tạo hằng năm
Annual learning and development budget
Các quyền lợi khác sẽ được nêu rõ khi phỏng vấn.
Other benefits to be discussed during the interview.
Thời gian làm việc / Working hours:
 Thứ 2 – Thứ 7, 8:00 – 17:00. 
Monday – Saturday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM.

title: Fullstack Developer (PHP)
company: CÔNG TY TNHH CÔNG NGHỆ SHIP VIỆT NAM
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


・We are looking for a motivated Fullstack Developer (PHP) to join our development team in Vietnam.        
・If you enjoy hands-on development, solving technical challenges, and collaborating with both Vietnamese and Japanese teams, this is a great opportunity to grow your technical and communication skills in a global working environment.        
       
[Main Responsibilities]        
・Develop and maintain web applications using PHP frameworks (Laravel, Phalcon, etc.)       
・Participate in both backend and frontend development for outsourcing projects       
・Work closely with IT Comtor and SE teams from the Japanese headquarters       
・Participate in requirement analysis, detailed design, coding, API documentation, unit testing, and system testing       
・Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize system performance       
・Collaborate with team members through code reviews and technical discussions       
・Support deployment, maintenance, and operational tasks when needed       
・Continuously improve development quality and workflows       
       
[Development skills mainly used at SHIP VN]        
・Backend       
 PHP (Laravel, Phalcon, etc.)      
 TypeScript（NestJS）      
 Ruby (Ruby on Rails)      
 Node.js (Express, etc.)      
・Frontend       
 React.js      
 Next.js      
 Flutter (Mobile apps)      
・Infrastructure / Cloud       
 AWS (ECS, S3, RDS, etc.)      
 Docker      
 CI/CD      
・Others       
 Git / GitHub      
 REST API development      
 SQL / Database design

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


[Required Skills & Experience]  
Must-Have: 
 ・At least 2 years of experience in Fullstack Web Development
 ・Experience in PHP is required.
 ・Experience in frontend development using React.js, Next.js, or similar frameworks
 ・Experience in API development and database design
 ・Experience with Git/GitHub for source code management
 ・Ability to analyze, design, and build systems
 ・Experience writing unit tests or test automation
 ・Strong logical thinking and problem-solving skills
 ・Proactive mindset with willingness to learn new technologies
 ・Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a team environment
 ・Experience utilizing AI tools during development
 
Nice-to-Have: 
 ・Experience working with AWS or cloud platforms
 ・Experience with Docker, CI/CD, or DevOps-related workflows
 ・Experience working in Agile/Scrum development teams
 ・Experience working with Japanese companies or offshore development projects
 ・Experience in performance optimization and system operation
 
[Ideal Candidate Profile]  
・Passionate about software development and technology 
・Enjoys teamwork and technical collaboration 
・Proactive and responsible in handling tasks 
・Interested in continuously improving technical skills 
・Comfortable working in an international environment 
・Interested in long-term career growth and stable development opportunities

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Company-provided laptop for work
Opportunity to collaborate with a global team in a dynamic development environment
Experience the balance between Japanese-style stability and Vietnamese flexibility
Open and transparent culture where your opinions are valued
Social insurance, health insurance, and unemployment insurance in accordance with Vietnamese labor law
Public holidays and annual leave according to Vietnamese labor law
Annual bonus
Annual salary review

title: Software Developer (JavaScript, Python)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Chúng tôi tìm kiếm một Python/Javascript Developer có khả năng làm việc hiệu quả trong môi trường đổi mới liên tục, và sẵn sàng thay đổi và tối ưu công việc khi nhận feedback từ team. Cụ thể có kinh nghiệm trong các công việc sau:
Web Scraping: Phát triển và duy trì các công cụ thu thập dữ liệu từ Website và API. 
ETL Pipeline: Xây dựng và tối ưu hóa các quy trình xử lý dữ liệu. 
AI Agent: Tích hợp và phát triển các agent tự động hóa công việc sử dụng AI (OpenAI, Langchain, Cursor AI…). 
Workflow Automation: Xử lý các tác vụ tự động hóa và quản lý job queue bằng Python hoặc Javascript (trên trình duyệt). 
Triển khai các hệ thống lên server Linux sử dụng Docker và Git.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Tốt nghiệp đại học chuyên ngành CNTT, Khoa học máy tính hoặc có kinh nghiệm liên quan.
Python: Thành thạo các thư viện như Requests, BeautifulSoup, Pandas, Asyncio, và Selenium, Playwright. 
Kinh nghiệm làm ETL pipeline và xử lý dữ liệu trên cơ sở dữ liệu SQL/NoSQL. 
Kinh nghiệm với AI Agents, API, hoặc tự động hóa quy trình bằng AI. 
Windows, Linux, Docker, Git: Có thể triển khai và duy trì hệ thống. 
Có tư duy chủ động, khả năng làm việc độc lập.
Đam mê phát triển cá nhân và có thể thay đổi để cải thiện chất lượng công việc.
Ưu tiên thêm nếu có:
Kinh nghiệm thực tế với các dự án Web Scraping và Data Automation. 
Biết về Cursor AI, MCP Server, hoặc các công cụ tương tự. 
Đã từng có repo GitHub hoặc sản phẩm Demo.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Mức lương thỏa thuận theo năng lực.
Thưởng cuối tháng theo năng lực, thưởng lễ, Tết, sinh nhật.
Thưởng lương tháng 13, xét tăng lương định kỳ hàng năm, tăng lương đột xuất theo năng lực.
Được đào tạo để phục vụ công việc, tham gia khóa học tiếng anh giao tiếp
Cung cấp đầy đủ trang thiết bị làm việc tại Văn phòng.
Được hưởng đầy đủ các chính sách BHXH, BHYT, BHTN theo Luật lao động của Nhà nước.
Cơ hội làm việc với các công nghệ hiện đại: AI, Automation, Scalable Systems..
Thời gian: 
Từ 7:00 - 16:00, nghỉ cuối tuần (04 ngày Chủ nhật và 02 ngày thứ Bảy).
Địa điểm: 
Lựa chọn 1 trong các địa điểm làm việc phù hợp sau:
Cơ sở 1: 22 Thành Công, Phường Giảng Võ, Hà Nội
Cơ sở 2: 02 Nguyễn Hoàng, Phường Từ Liêm, Hà Nội
Cơ sở 3: 150 Nguyễn Xí, Phường Bình Thạnh, TP. Hồ Chí Minh

title: Software Developer (C#/ T-SQL/ JavaScript/ HTML/ CSS)

Job description
