ShopStack is a technology company with offices in Vietnam and Thailand, helping leading brands across Southeast Asia build and scale their eCommerce presence. We work with exciting clients on complex Shopify and Magento projects — and we're growing fast.
We're a team of developers, architects, designers, and problem-solvers who work hard, move fast, and genuinely enjoy what we build together.
We're looking for a 
Shopify Team Lead
 to join our Hanoi team. You'll lead a team of developers, own technical delivery on Shopify projects, and play a key role in shaping how we build for our clients.
This is a hands-on leadership role — you'll be both a technical contributor and a team mentor. 
We're looking for a 
Shopify Team Lead 
to join our Hanoi team. You'll own technical delivery across the team's Shopify projects, lead and grow a team of developers, and be the primary technical voice in front of our clients. This is a hands-on leadership role — you'll code, architect, and mentor, while being accountable for what the team ships.
What You'll Do
Own end-to-end technical delivery and quality for the team's Shopify projects — accountable for outcomes, not just personal output
Lead and mentor a team of Shopify developers: delegate tasks, review code, and actively grow their skills
Own solution architecture decisions for Shopify projects, including third-party integrations — payment gateways, ERPs, logistics platforms, and more
Design order workflow and inventory management solutions for eCommerce and multi-channel environments
Lead client-facing technical conversations — requirement discussions, solution proposals, and delivery reviews
Set and enforce best practices in code quality, testing, and performance optimization across the team
Act as the escalation point for complex technical issues and client concerns

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Required
5+ years 
of hands-on Shopify development experience
Proven experience leading a development team, with accountability for delivery outcomes
Strong proficiency in 
Shopify Liquid, Shopify APIs (REST & GraphQL), HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript
Experience owning solution architecture decisions, including third-party API and payment gateway integrations
Experience extending 
Shopify's native functionality through Shopify Functions and UI extensions (theme app extensions, app extensions, and checkout UI extensions
Solid understanding of eCommerce UX principles and best practices
Familiarity with caching technologies and relational/non-relational databases
Proficient with AI-assisted development tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Cursor, ChatGPT, or equivalent) — using AI to boost productivity and code quality is an expected part of how we work
Strong written and verbal communication skills in English — comfortable presenting to clients
Nice to Have
Experience with Magento 2 or other eCommerce platforms (e.g., WooCommerce, BigCommerce)
What to Expect
Full ownership of technical decisions on your projects, with direct, ongoing client exposure at the requirements and delivery-review stage — not just internal execution

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Competitive salary package: 
35 - 50M
Comprehensive healthcare coverage
Flexible working hours — 40 hours/week, Monday to Friday
13-month salary bonus
13 days paid leave per year
Clear career development path and real opportunities to grow into senior leadership

title: Android Developer (Kotlin/Java)
company: Ngân hàng TMCP Phương Đông | OCB
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


We are on a journey to modernize our digital banking platform. We aren't just maintaining code; we are re-engineering it for speed, scale, and security. We are looking for experienced mobile engineers enjoys solving complex technical challenges and wants to have a direct influence on the architecture of a real-world banking application.
 
 Modernize & Optimize: Lead the transition to cleaner, modularized code. Improve app performance, responsiveness, and memory management.
 Build the Future: Design and implement new, user-centric features that make banking easier for millions of customers.
 Engineering Excellence: Champion best practices through code reviews, automated testing, and proactive refactoring of legacy components
 Collaborate: Partner closely with Backend, Product, and UX/UI teams to turn business needs into high-performance technical solutions.
Solve Problems: Tackle production challenges head-on, ensuring our platform is stable, secure, and reliable.
 
Your Skills and Experience
Different projects and squads may focus on different technical domains. Candidates with strengths in relevant areas will be considered for suitable engineering teams across our banking technology ecosystem.
 
1. Engineering Rigor & Quality
•    Testing Culture: Hands-on experience writing Unit Tests, Automated UI Tests, and API Mocks/Stubs. You prioritize testable code over "quick fixes."
•    Code Health: Deep application of SOLID, YAGNI, and KISS principles. Strict adherence to coding conventions and documentation standards.
•    Performance: Proven ability to identify and resolve bottlenecks using platform profiling tools (e.g., Instruments, Android Profiler). Experience with threading and complex offline data synchronization.
2. Banking-Grade Security & Integration
•    Security (Critical): Strong knowledge of secure mobile practices: Certificate Pinning, secure storage mechanisms (Keychain/Keystore), biometric authentication (FaceID/TouchID/ Fingerprint), and obfuscation techniques.
•    API Orchestration: Deep understanding of RESTful API lifecycle, request/response cycle management, and handling token-based authentication flows in a secure environment.
•    Ecosystem: Experience integrating and maintaining 3rd-party SDKs (e.g., Firebase, Analytics, Marketing tools like AppsFlyer, and UI frameworks like SnapKit/libraries across Android and iOS ecosystems).
3. Workflow & Tools:
•    DevOps/Collaboration: Daily usage of Git/GitLab and Jira/Redmine. You are comfortable with branching strategies (GitFlow/Trunk-based), code review workflows, and CI/CD practices.
•    Design-to-Code: High proficiency in interpreting complex Figma designs, ensuring pixel-perfect responsiveness across all device screen sizes and OS versions.
4. Strategic & "Plus" Skills
•    Technical Leadership: Ability to mentor junior developers, perform deep code reviews, and drive architectural decisions.
•    Future-Proofing: Experience or strong interest in Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) for cross-platform logic sharing.
•    Continuous Learning: A proactive mindset to evaluate, prototype, and implement new mobile methodologies to improve the development lifecycle.
•    AI-SDLC: Experience in leverage AI tools in product development activities.
5. Core Competencies
5.1 Android Developer
•    Experience: 5+ years of professional experience in native Android development with Kotlin.
•    Technical Foundation: Deep understanding of the Android Lifecycle, OOP, and multithreading.
•    Architectural Mindset: Strong experience with MVVM, Clean Architecture, and Modularization. You should know how to build apps that are easy to test and maintain.
•    Modern Tools: Proficiency with Coroutines and Flow.
•    Quality Focused: You understand SOLID principles and aren’t afraid to refactor to improve code health.
•    Communication: Ability to work well in a team and explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.
Bonus points for:
•    Hands-on experience with Jetpack Compose.
•    Experience in the Fintech/Banking domain or exposure to platforms like Backbase.
•    Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines.
•    Experience integrating advanced features like OCR/eKYC or AI-driven chatbots.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience

Different projects and squads may focus on different technical domains. Candidates with strengths in relevant areas will be considered for suitable engineering teams across our banking technology ecosystem.
 
1. Engineering Rigor & Quality

•    Design-to-Code: High proficiency in interpreting complex Figma designs, ensuring pixel-perfect responsiveness across all device screen sizes and OS versions.

-    100% salary during probation

description:
=== Job description ===

Introduction
Under the “BETTER SYSTEMS, BETTER WORLD” vision, RAKSUL aims to bring technology to traditional industries and transform the industry structure itself.
In Japan, RAKSUL already has more than JPY 50 billion in gross merchandise value (GMV) and a strong customer base, and is also looking to expand business opportunities in the payments domain. title: Analysis Platform MLOps (DevOps, TypeScript, Python)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Recruitment Background & Expected Role
 
CADDi is on a mission to "Unleash the potential of manufacturing."
We operate "CADDi DRAWER," a cloud-based system that supports digital transformation centered on the use of drawings, which are the most essential data in the manufacturing industry.
One of the issues we are currently facing in the development of this rapidly growing product is developer productivity. The inefficiencies in the development environment have become more noticeable, and they are becoming a hindrance to the development of features and a degradation of the developer experience. As an activity to resolve these issues, the need for Platform Engineering is increasing.
There are various interpretations and approaches to Platform Engineering in the world, but here, we will be working on providing tools and infrastructure to increase the development velocity by “separating concerns.”
 
Examples of anticipated tasks (not limited to)
Among these, in this post, you will be working on the following tasks
Build API and batch execution environments for running machine learning model inference, as well as deployment environments using CI/CD.
Implement monitoring, performance tuning, and other improvements to enhance site reliability in production environments.
Optimize the cost of inference and training platforms.
Create the deployment and operation processes based on input from the modeling and platform teams.
Actively experiment with new ML, MLOps, and infrastructure tools, quickly validating ideas through proof-of-concepts and applying what works to real company products.
* Besides the team we are recruiting for this time, you may be assigned to other teams depending on your experience and preferences. (In that case, we would be happy to discuss this with you at the interview.)
* After joining the company, your role may change due to organizational growth or an individual's career perspective.
 
Interest and experience gained from this position
Close collaboration with ML engineers and product management members, allowing you to expand your responsibilities depending on your interests and initiative.
The fun of integrating a complex domain into a system
Experience in solving difficult problems with highly motivated team members
Experience in contributing to the scale of a product with technical skills
Experience in developing products that are deployed globally
Experience in providing value to society through the development of products that change
Organization
Currently, the Analysis Platform team focuses on supporting modeling, ML serving, and operational workflows. Looking ahead, we aim not only to reduce the cognitive and operational burden around machine learning, but also to build a robust foundation for ML verification—ultimately shortening the lead time needed to validate business value.
To achieve this, the Analysis Platform team will expand its scope beyond traditional MLOps. We will take on broader challenges such as improving annotation efficiency and developing mechanisms that enable faster and more reliable value validation.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


MUST-HAVE REQUIREMENTS
5+ years of professional experience as a software engineer
Experience leading software development
We especially value experience leading design, development, operations, and the necessary communication involved in roles such as team lead or project driver, regardless of project size
At least 2 years of experience in ONE or more of the following:
Developing shared platforms or backend systems using cloud infrastructure.
Designing and operating Machine Learning systems (MLOps) with consideration for latency, cost, and non-functional requirements.
Developing Generative AI applications using LLMs, RAG architectures, and Vector Databases.
Hands-on experience with statically typed programming languages (such as TypeScript, Rust, Java/Kotlin, Go, etc)
General understanding of the core Computer Science concepts behind AI (such as Vector Space, Embeddings, or Inference) and the ability to leverage these principles to build and integrate AI-driven features into software platforms.
Experience in development using public cloud platforms such as AWS, Google Cloud, etc.
Fluent business communication skills in English, able to complete daily tasks in English, including text communication and meetings.（CEFR B1 or Higher level)
Must currently reside in Vietnam or have plans to relocate. Foreign nationals must also hold a valid Vietnam work permit or be legally eligible to work in Vietnam.
NICE-TO-HAVE REQUIREMENTS
Experience developing machine learning pipelines using tools such as Vertex AI Pipelines, Kubeflow, Apache Beam, or Spark
Familiarity with at least one ML/AI framework such as scikit-learn, PyTorch, or TensorFlow.
Development experience related to MLOps or SRE
Experience collaborating with ML engineers to continuously improve and deliver machine learning and data science models
Experience building and operating systems such as Data Lakes or Feature Stores
Experience implementing initiatives to improve data quality for data-centric ML model improvement
Experience planning and driving data utilization initiatives—internally or externally—using tools such as BigQuery or Redash
Basic knowledge of algorithms related to machine learning, statistics, linear algebra, and computer science
Experience working with Scrum or Agile methodologies.
Conversational-level Japanese proficiency(Japanese Language Proficiency Test N2 or above is a guideline)
WE ARE LOOKING FOR THIS KIND OF PERSON
Those who can sympathize with CADDi's mission “Unleashing the Potential of the Manufacturing Industry”.
Those who have a T-shaped ambition mindset to maximize their expertise by not only focusing on back-end and infrastructure, but also catching up on peripheral knowledge as needed.
Those who are able to face essential issues and take action to solve them with a sense of ownership.
Able to work through positive attitude and constructive discussions in fast-changing and uncertain situations.
Able to communicate and discuss with an attitude of respect for others, taking into consideration their context and resolution
PRODUCT DEVELOPING ENVIRONMENT
Front-end:TypeScript, React, Next.js
Backend: Rust(axum),TypeScript, Node.js (Express,Fastify,NestJS), Python (FastAPI)
Machine Learning/Algorithms: Rust, Python, OpenCV, PyTorch,TorchServe, Elasticsearch, Vertex AI
Infrastructure: Google Cloud, Google Kubernetes Engine, Anthos Service Mesh, Istio, Cloudflare, Argo Workflows
Event Bus: Cloud Pub/Sub
DevOps: GitHub, GitHub Actions, ArgoCD, Kustomize, Helm, Terraform, Datadog, MixPanel, Sentry
Data: CloudSQL (PostgreSQL), AlloyDB, BigQuery, dbt, trocco
API: GraphQL, REST, gRPC
Authentication: Auth0
Development tools: GitHub Copilot, Figma, Storybook
Communication Tools: Slack, Discord, JIRA, Miro, Confluence

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


APPLICATION GUIDELINES & BENEFITS
1. Working style:
Hybrid (come to Office at least twice a week)
2. Office address: 
HCMC: 7F, Gia Loc Building, No. 27-29 Nguyen Cuu Van Street, Ward 17, Binh Thanh District, HCMC
Hanoi: Unit 9.03, 9F, The West Building, 265 Cau Giay Street, Cau Giay Ward, Hanoi
3. Employment type: 
Official full-time employee
Probation period: 2 months
4. Holidays and leave:
Annual paid leave: 12 days
National holidays
Year-end holidays (December 31 to January 3)
Tet holidays
Others (following Labor Regulations)
5. Benefits:
13th month salary
Salary review: twice a year
100% monthly basic salary and mandatory social insurances in 2-month probation
Premium Health Insurance
Social insurance, health insurance, unemployment insurance, workers’ accident compensation insurance
Annual health check-up
Allowances such as: child-care allowance, commuting allowance, life event congratulatory gift, etc
Growth support such as subsidy for server fee, support for attending external training courses
Intensive training program (external or internal training courses, workshop etc)
Devices: PC and display of desired specifications
Awards: Company awards, every 6 month MVP awards
Activities: Year-end-party, team building, etc

title: Android Infotainment, Camera & Media Application Engine
company: Suntech Vina (Hợp tác cùng tập đoàn CNTT hàng đầu Ấn độ)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Suntech Vina
 is currently partnering with 
KPIT Technologies
 to recruit top-tier talent for their 
very first office in Hanoi. 
About KPIT: 
A leading global technology company specializing in automotive software and smart mobility solutions. At KPIT, you will thrive in a dynamic, collaborative environment, working on cutting-edge technologies alongside a talented global engineering team.
Job Summary: 
The Android Infotainment, Camera & Media Application Engineer will lead the development, architecture, and feature optimization of passenger-facing applications within the vehicle cabin. This role focuses on global radio applications, multi-source media center aggregation (USB, Bluetooth, Streaming), local file-browsing services, gallery asset management, and critical low-latency video recording systems like the automotive Digital Video Recorder (DVR/Dashcam).
Key Responsibilities:
 
Design and implement localized automotive applications utilizing modern Android UI toolkits, ensuring multi-language support, regional requirements, and responsive designs.
Develop a unified multi-source multimedia aggregation application (CarMedia) supporting cross-input playlist management, audio/video playback engines, and seamless state transitions.
Architect and maintain the Digital Video Recorder (DVR) module, managing continuous loop recording, file browser indexing, playback frameworks, and automatic sensor-triggered emergency clip preservation.
Optimize USB local media services (USB music) and asset viewers (Gallery), refining preview generations, filtering operations, and resolving framework performance lags.
Implement high-performance dynamic user interface components, such as vector-based HVAC climate control animations, without introducing framework-level UI stuttering.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Deep expertise in Android Application architecture (MVVM/MVI), custom views, and rendering optimization (Jetpack Compose or Android View System).
Strong knowledge of the Android Media Framework, ExoPlayer, storage abstraction access, and broadcast radio APIs.
Proficiency in managing camera pipelines, local file structures, memory caching, and raw asset streaming buffers.
Advanced proficiency in Kotlin and Java, with a solid grasp of writing efficient asynchronous code using Coroutines or RxJava.
Required Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
1-6+ years of experience in Android development, with at least 3 years specializing in Automotive HMI, multimedia routing, or embedded camera applications.
Desired / Preferred Qualifications:
Familiarity with automotive event listening (e.g., G-Sensor crash triggers hitting the application layer via VHAL/CarService)

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Quyền lợi khi tham gia dự án
Học hỏi công nghệ tiên tiến:
 Làm việc trực tiếp với các công nghệ mới nhất trong 
Android Automotive, Linux BSP, ADAS
 – những lĩnh vực định hình tương lai của phương tiện điều khiển bằng phần mềm.
Hợp tác với các tập đoàn toàn cầu:
 Tham gia cùng một trong những công ty kỹ thuật CNTT hàng đầu Ấn Độ, được tin cậy bởi nhiều OEM và Tier-1, và một tập đoàn công nghệ ô tô toàn cầu đang cung cấp 
digital cockpit & giải pháp xe thông minh
 cho hàng triệu phương tiện.
Phát triển sự nghiệp quốc tế:
 Cơ hội làm việc tại các trung tâm phát triển toàn cầu của công ty tại 
Châu Âu, Nhật Bản và Ấn Độ
.
Tác động quy mô lớn:
 Công việc của bạn sẽ ảnh hưởng trực tiếp đến 
thế hệ xe thông minh tiếp theo
, phục vụ hàng triệu tài xế toàn cầu.
Đây là cơ hội hiếm có để tăng tốc sự nghiệp trong lĩnh vực 
kỹ thuật phần mềm ô tô
, trở thành một phần của một chương trình mang tầm toàn cầu.

title: AI Consultant﻿ (Python, JavaScript, TypeScript)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


We are hiring an AI Consultant to design, build, and ship production-grade AI platforms and agentic systems for our global clients. The ideal candidate is comfortable owning AI products end-to-end — from problem definition and architecture through retrieval pipeline design, LLM orchestration, and deployment — with a strong focus on reliability, cost efficiency, and scale. This role suits an engineer who has built RAG systems and multi-agent platforms in production, can move comfortably between AI engineering and full-stack delivery, and aligns architectural decisions with long-term business outcomes.
•     Design and deliver production-ready AI platforms, agentic pipelines, and resilient data and retrieval workflows.
•     Architect and implement multi-agent systems using LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, and custom orchestration frameworks where efficiency demands it.
•     Build and optimize Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines across structured and unstructured data sources using vector databases such as ChromaDB, FAISS, Weaviate, and Pinecone.
•     Own end-to-end AI feature delivery — retrieval logic, prompt engineering, model selection, API integration, and deployment.
•     Build and maintain LLMOps and MLOps tooling, including prompt versioning, evaluation, monitoring, and inference cost optimization.
•     Develop full-stack AI applications using Python/FastAPI on the backend and React/Next.js on the frontend.
•     Integrate with model providers and platforms including OpenAI, Anthropic, Vertex AI, Azure AI Foundry, Azure OpenAI, and Azure AI Search.
•     Design compliance-aware AI systems for regulated industries (e.g., healthcare, pharmaceutical, financial services).
•     Take ownership of cloud and infrastructure decisions across AWS (Glue, S3, EMR, EC2), GCP, and edge platforms such as Cloudflare Workers, Vercel, and Netlify.
•     Translate ambiguous business requirements into stable, shippable, well-architected systems.
•     Working time:               14:00-23:00, 5 days / week, 2 weekoffs / week
•     Start date:                    ASAP
•     Engagement:               Long-term
•     Language:                    English professional mandatory

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


•     3+ years of hands-on experience in AI engineering, agentic systems, or applied machine learning.
•     Strong proficiency in Python and modern AI tooling: LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, FastAPI.
•     Proven experience designing and deploying production RAG pipelines and multi-agent architectures.
•     Hands-on experience with vector databases (ChromaDB, FAISS, Weaviate, Pinecone) and embedding strategies.
•     Solid working knowledge of LLMOps practices: prompt versioning, evaluation, inference cost optimization, and deployment workflows.
•     Experience with at least one major cloud platform — AWS (Glue, S3, EMR, EC2), GCP (Vertex AI), or Azure (AI Foundry, OpenAI, AI Search).
•     Strong full-stack ability: comfortable building both backend APIs (FastAPI) and frontend interfaces (React, Next.js).
•     Working knowledge of JavaScript/TypeScript; exposure to additional languages (Rust, Java, C/C++) is a plus.
•     Demonstrated ability to take systems from problem definition through to production deployment.
•     Excellent ownership mindset, with strong communication and stakeholder alignment skills.
Preferred Qualifications (Good to Have)
•     Experience with Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations, Chrome extensions, or developer-tooling products.
•     Background delivering AI products in regulated domains — pharmaceutical, healthcare, fintech.
•     Experience with edge and serverless deployment (Cloudflare Workers, D1, R2, Pages; Vercel; Netlify).
•     Familiarity with DevOps and CloudOps practices, CI/CD, NGINX, and containerized deployments.
•     Relevant certifications: Google Cloud (Agentic AI, MLOps for Generative AI), Multi-Agent Systems with ADK, Hybrid Vector Search, Responsible AI, or equivalent.
Education
•     Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related discipline (required).
•     Advanced degree or specialized AI/ML coursework considered a plus.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


•     Join a French tech company in Vietnam, combining European standards with local agility 
•     Work in a truly international environment, with 13+ nationalities collaborating daily 
•     Contribute to projects serving clients in 32 countries worldwide 
•     Be part of long term, meaningful SaaS projects with real business impact 
•     Grow your skills through mentoring, code reviews, and collaboration with experienced teams 
•     Enjoy a professional, supportive, and people focused work culture 
•     Visa, resident card, and work permit provided for expat profiles working in Vietnam

title: Senior Java Developer (Spring/OOP)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


We are looking for a person, who can:
● Designing and estimating feature architecture based on the written specification.
● Implementing features full-stack (Java backend + ExtJS frontend + database migrations)
● Ensuring code quality through testing and code review
● Working independently with minimum guidance

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


You properly are a potential candidate for this position, if you have:
● Able to use AI tools to accelerate development
● Strong understanding of object-oriented design patterns.
● Fluency in Java 8+ and the related ecosystem.
● Solid experience with Spring Framework (dependency injection, transactions, security, scheduling)
● Solid experience with Hibernate/JPA (entity mapping, lazy/eager loading, cascading, HQL/JPQL)
● Good at JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.
● Strong SQL skills and experience with database migration tools (Liquibase or Flyway)
● Experience with multi-threaded / concurrent programming
● Experience with Gradle or Maven build systems
● Able to quickly learn and work with new APIs, SDKs.
● Able to follow existing code standards.
● Able to write modules, clean and well-tested code.
● At least 5 years of experience in a relevant position.
● Intermediate+ English (reading specs, writing documentation, team communication)
● At least 1 year of mentoring, training, or managing experience.
You would be a strong candidate, if you have one of these following:
● Knowledge of virtualization concepts (VMs, snapshots, replication, hypervisor APIs)
● Experience with Linux administration and bash scripting
● Familiarity with PowerShell for Windows automation
● Experience with network programming (sockets, SSH, HTTP clients)
● Experience with SVN, Jira, and Confluence
● IntelliJ IDEA or VSCode
● Experience with large monolithic Java codebases

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


The Nakivo team in Vietnam has been changing very fast in the recent years, we have grown from a group of 6 engineers to the current team size of 80 and we are expecting to grow even more in the next following years. 
We welcome and embrace people, regardless of their background, religion, nationality or gender, but focus on diversity, contribution, determination and work ethic. At Nakivo, we are trying to improve everyday, to become a competitive choice for talented people, by offering
Flexible working hours: Office opens from 6.00 AM to 10.00 PM
Private health care package
Premium health care check
Gift (cash/voucher) for every special occasion: New Year's Eve, Tet holidays, International Women's Day, International Children's Day, Mid-Autumn Festival and Birthday
15-18 annual leaves/year, 5 sick leaves and additional leaves (up to 3 days)
Team building
Free and un-limited snack, tea, coffee and by-choice request.

title: Lead Java Engineer
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Participate in innovative software development life cycle using agile methodologies
Be responsible for the quality of the technical solution of Java application
Solve technical conflicts and make rational decisions between technical choices
Adhere to the coding standards, best practices, common design patterns & principles
Set standards, provide technical guidance, and perform reviews to verify adherence to coding standards
Hands-on to solve Java technical issues
Perform code review, provide recommendations, and directions for continuous improvement of the code quality, technical debt reduction, unit tests, and coding standards
Collaborate with the architecture team to update and/or build the technical designs
Coach and train developers, help them to implement the software in line with the designs and standards, and to become independent of technical aspects
Self-manage in designing the technical stack for development projects 
When necessary, research new or emerging technologies and frameworks, give recommendations, build proofs of concept, and conduct training

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Bachelor's degree in computer science or equivalent
6 years of proven experience in software development of this applied stack
Able to work hands-on and set up a code base for medium application.
Able to read and write technical documents, report in the English language
Able to bridge the technical discussions between developers and other non-technical stakeholders
Able to work independently and as part of the team
Able to multitask and prioritize tasks effectively
Has a wide range of technical knowledge in many areas, such as front-end, database, and cloud
Ability to understand designs documented in mainstream methodologies such as ADD, UML, and BPMN.
Knowledgeable in continuous integration and deployment technologies (Jenkins, Docker)
Strong mindset and skillset in controlling technical quality, proven experience in design review, code review, and clean-code tools such as Sonar
Nice to have
Experience and/or certifications on Amazon, Azure, and Oracle clouds
Knowledge of the Agile methodology (Scrum)
Knowledge of other programming languages
Experience in leading a project or a team

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Professional European-based company
Attractive salary
Performance bonus of up to 4 months‘ salary
Opportunities for travel to Europe
Hybrid home/office working model
Flexible working time
Structured training & development roadmap
Good work-life balance
Premium healthcare insurance
Loyalty programs
Well-being activities
Annual company trips and team-building events

title: Senior Acoustic Engineer (Embedded, Matlab,Python,RTOS)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


We are looking for a mid-level to senior Acoustic Engineer to join our R&D department with 5+ years of experience in design, prototyping and testing. This role is for someone who thrives on autonomy  — you will be setting the acoustic engineering foundation from scratch, working alongside embedded, electrical, software, and hardware engineers who are strong in their own disciplines. This department functions like a startup environment, so there are opportunities for career growth.
Expectations
Play a key role in designing products from initial design to production stage
Work with cross-functional teams at every stage of production to deliver various projects
Able to interpret ambiguous technical documentation
Component and system-level troubleshooting
Test all necessary audio components
Solid background in digital signal processing (dsp) for speech and audio
Hand-on experiences with noise suppression and speech enhancement
Experience with Python and MATLAB, and C/C++ programming
Experience with low-power platforms or embedded

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Degree in Acoustics, Audio Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or Equivalent
5+ years of hands-on experience developing acoustic or audio hardware products from initial design through production
Experience in audio products (acoustics and electronics)
Experience with microphone array design and acoustic material selection
Familiarity with speech masking and sound masking principles
Experience working with cross-functional team members from multiple disciplines to reach fact-based decisions
Experience with ANC hardware design — transducer placement, feedforward/feedback mic positioning, and enclosure geometry for ANC systems
Ability to work independently as the sole acoustic specialist on the team

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Modern Grade A office located in the heart of District 1.
Unlimited coffee, tea, and refreshments provided daily.
Monthly themed team activities, including beverages, board games, and team bonding events.
12 annual leave days.
1-month probation period.
Social, health, and unemployment insurance based on 
100% of the gross salary
.
Monthly parking and mobile phone allowance.
Young, dynamic, and collaborative working environment with opportunities for growth.

title: CT2101- Backend/Fullstack Developer (C#, .NET, ReactJS)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Về vị trí này
Celltics Technology là startup công nghệ đến từ Hàn Quốc, chuyên phát triển giải pháp tự động hóa workflow cho ngành dược phẩm và công nghệ sinh học. Công ty cung cấp giải pháp tích hợp cả phần mềm và phần cứng, từ nền tảng điều khiển robot, phần mềm quản lý thiết bị, hệ thống API web-based, đến các thiết bị quang học chính xác như kính hiển vi, mô-đun quang phổ và thiết bị phục vụ nghiên cứu – sản xuất trong lĩnh vực biotech/pharma. Thông qua mạng lưới đối tác, Celltics Technology hiện đã cung cấp giải pháp cho hơn 10 công ty dược phẩm lớn và viện nghiên cứu toàn cầu.
Địa điểm làm việc: Đà Nẵng, Hà Nội, TP. Hồ Chí Minh
Văn phòng:
- Đà Nẵng: Đường Trần Đại Nghĩa, P. Hòa Quý
- Hà Nội: Đường Quang Trung, P. Hà Đông
- TP.HCM: Đường Số 8, KĐT Phú Mỹ Hưng, P. Tân Mỹ
Trách nhiệm
Về vị trí này
Ở vị trí này, bạn sẽ tham gia phát triển các hệ thống phần mềm phục vụ tự động hóa thiết bị trong ngành dược phẩm và công nghệ sinh học. Công việc phù hợp với ứng viên yêu thích sản phẩm công nghệ ứng dụng thực tế, muốn làm việc với hệ thống có kết nối giữa phần mềm, dữ liệu và thiết bị tự động hóa.
Mô tả công việc
- Phát triển hệ thống quản lý dữ liệu cho các thiết bị dược phẩm / biotech.
- Xây dựng dashboard để theo dõi, hiển thị và phân tích dữ liệu vận hành thiết bị.
- Thiết kế và phát triển web-based API cho các giải pháp tự động hóa.
- Phát triển phần mềm điều khiển các mô-đun tự động hóa.
- Phối hợp với team sản phẩm để hiểu nhu cầu người dùng và cải thiện trải nghiệm sử dụng.
- Làm việc với các thành phần phần mềm liên quan đến thiết bị, dữ liệu, giao diện quản trị và vận hành hệ thống.
- Tham gia đưa ra giải pháp kỹ thuật phù hợp với sản phẩm và yêu cầu thực tế từ khách hàng.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Yêu cầu ứng viên
Ứng viên chỉ cần phù hợp một trong hai nhóm kỹ năng dưới đây:
Nhóm Backend
- Có từ 4 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển với C#.
- Có kinh nghiệm sử dụng .NET 5.0 trở lên.
- Có kinh nghiệm xây dựng web service, API hoặc hệ thống backend.
- Có tư duy tốt về cấu trúc hệ thống, xử lý dữ liệu và logic nghiệp vụ.
Hoặc nhóm Frontend / Full-stack
- Có từ 4 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển với React.
- Thành thạo JavaScript / TypeScript.
- Có kinh nghiệm xây dựng giao diện web, dashboard hoặc hệ thống quản trị.
- Có khả năng phối hợp với backend/API để phát triển sản phẩm hoàn chỉnh.
Yêu cầu chung
- Có khả năng hiểu sản phẩm và đưa ra quyết định hợp lý dựa trên nhu cầu khách hàng.
- Có tư duy chủ động, trách nhiệm và sẵn sàng làm việc trong môi trường startup công nghệ.
- Có khả năng giao tiếp bằng tiếng Anh hoặc tiếng Hàn.
Điểm cộng
- Từng phát triển dashboard, hệ thống quản lý dữ liệu hoặc web-based API.
- Có kinh nghiệm với hệ thống điều khiển thiết bị, automation, robotics hoặc IoT.
- Quan tâm đến lĩnh vực dược phẩm, biotech, lab automation hoặc thiết bị nghiên cứu.
- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với team Hàn Quốc hoặc môi trường quốc tế.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Quyền lợi
- Mức lương khoảng 23–24 triệu VND/tháng gross, thỏa thuận theo năng lực.
- Cơ hội làm việc với startup công nghệ Hàn Quốc trong lĩnh vực đang phát triển mạnh: pharma/biotech automation.
- Tham gia phát triển sản phẩm có ứng dụng thực tế trong phòng lab, nghiên cứu và sản xuất.
- Môi trường làm việc linh hoạt, bắt đầu làm việc từ 9:00–9:30.
- Hỗ trợ bữa trưa, bữa tối khi làm thêm.
- Có ngày phép năm, nghỉ nửa ngày và các chế độ nghỉ phép theo chính sách công ty.
- Hỗ trợ chi phí học tập, đào tạo, mua sách.
- Văn hóa làm việc cởi mở, phẳng, khuyến khích chia sẻ ý kiến.
- Có quà dịp lễ và hỗ trợ hiếu hỉ.

title: Junior Android Developer (Kotlin/Java)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


We are looking for a 
Junior Android Developer
 to join our growing 
Motorist Vietnam
 team.
You will help design, optimize, and enhance the Motorist mobile application — one of Singapore’s leading automotive platforms — using the latest Android technologies to deliver the best experience for drivers across Southeast Asia.
1. Education
● Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field.
● Final-year students or fresh graduates with strong Android project portfolios are also welcome to apply.
2. Responsibilities
● Design, build, and maintain advanced features for the Motorist app using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose.
● Implement modern architectures using MVVM, Hilt/Dagger (Dependency Injection), and Coroutines.
● Work with frameworks and libraries such as Retrofit2 + OkHttp3, Realm, RxJava, and Firebase Crashlytics / Analytics.
● Collaborate closely with backend developers, designers, and QA testers to ensure smooth, high-performance user experiences.
● Debug, refactor, and continuously optimize the Motorist app for reliability and scalability.
● Conduct research and apply emerging Android technologies to improve performance and user satisfaction.
● Participate in sprint planning, code reviews, and team knowledge sharing sessions.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Technical Experiences
Must Have
● Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field.
● Understanding of Java/Kotlin, Android Studio, and Android SDK fundamentals.
● Familiar with SOLID principles, OOP, data structures, and clean architecture (MVVM).
● Experience working with databases such as SQLite, Room, and Realm.
● Understanding of RESTful API integration and JSON data handling.
● Proficient understanding of code version control tools, such as Git.
● Strong attention to detail and analytical problem-solving mindset.
Nice to Have
● Exposure to Jetpack Compose, Retrofit2 / OkHttp3, RxJava, or Google Maps SDK.
● Basic understanding of Firebase Messaging, Crashlytics, or Remote Config.
● Familiarity with Material 3 Design, Coroutines Flow, or JUnit / Espresso testing.
● Appreciation for clean, maintainable, and well-structured code.
● Collaborative mindset and a reliable team player who takes ownership of their work.
Language Skills
● Able to communicate and collaborate in English (written and spoken).
● Willing to learn and improve communication when working with Singapore HQ and other markets.
Flexible Points
We welcome engineers who:
● Are passionate about Android development and eager to grow in a professional environment.
● May not have long working experience but can demonstrate strong fundamentals and self-learning ability.
● Want to master Jetpack Compose, Kotlin Coroutines, and Clean Architecture.
● Are not yet fluent in English but are motivated to practice and improve daily.
● Enjoy solving problems and building high-quality apps that users love.
Notice
Candidates are required to provide reference information after passing the interview round.
At 
Motorist
, we believe in 
work hard, play hard.
 You’ll be part of an energetic and collaborative team that encourages creativity, learning, and ownership.
Join us to grow your career and help build one of Singapore’s leading automotive platforms.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


● Competitive salary with annual performance review and 13th-month bonus.
● Modern working devices: MacBook, monitor, Android test phones, etc.
● PVI Health Insurance and full social insurance as per Vietnam Labor Law.
● 15 days annual leave, increasing by 1 day per year.
● English language training sponsored by the company.
● Professional development and opportunities to travel to Singapore for training.
● Friendly, innovative, and young working environment in District 2, Ho Chi Minh City.
● Working hours: 7 hours/day, Monday to Friday (no weekends).
● Year-end party and team-building activities.
● Unlimited potential for career growth and internal advancement.

title: Software Engineer (PHP, Ruby on Rails, JLPT N3)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Giai đoạn 1 – Đào tạo tại Việt Nam
Tham gia chương trình đào tạo cơ bản trong 02 tháng.
Học quy trình phát triển phần mềm theo tiêu chuẩn Nhật Bản.
Đào tạo kỹ năng làm việc nhóm, quản lý công việc và giao tiếp với khách hàng Nhật Bản.
Giai đoạn 2 – OJT tại Nhật Bản
Tham gia chương trình OJT (On-the-Job Training) tại Nhật Bản từ tháng 10/2026 đến tháng 12/2026.
Làm việc trực tiếp cùng các kỹ sư Nhật Bản.
Tham gia các dự án thực tế và học hỏi kinh nghiệm phát triển phần mềm trong môi trường quốc tế.
Giai đoạn 3 – Làm việc tại Việt Nam
Quay về Việt Nam từ tháng 01/2027.
Tham gia phát triển các dự án phần mềm cho khách hàng Nhật Bản.
Có cơ hội trở thành kỹ sư chủ chốt hoặc Team Leader trong tương lai.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Bắt buộc
Tiếng Nhật tối thiểu N3.
Có khả năng giao tiếp tiếng Nhật trong công việc.
Tinh thần học hỏi cao.
Có trách nhiệm với công việc.
Mong muốn phát triển nghề nghiệp lâu dài trong lĩnh vực phần mềm.
Có kinh nghiệm về các ngôn ngữ Lập trình Web (PHP, Ruby on Rails) là lợi thế.
Ưu tiên
Đã từng học tập hoặc làm việc trong môi trường Nhật Bản.
Có kiến thức về lập trình Web, Mobile hoặc AI.
Có khả năng làm việc nhóm tốt.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Đối với kỹ sư phần mềm có kinh nghiệm từ 02 năm
●  Mức lương tại Việt Nam từ 
20.000.000 VNĐ/tháng (được nhận lúc OJT ở Nhật)
.
●  Được tham gia chương trình OJT tại Nhật Bản.
●  Công ty chi trả toàn bộ:
○  Vé máy bay khứ hồi Việt Nam – Nhật Bản.
○  Chi phí đi lại phục vụ công việc.
○  Chi phí nhà ở trong thời gian OJT.
Đối với kỹ sư phần mềm chưa có kinh nghiệm
●  Mức lương tại Việt Nam từ 
15.000.000 VNĐ/tháng (được nhận lúc OJT ở Nhật)
.
●  Được tham gia chương trình OJT tại Nhật Bản.
●  Công ty chi trả toàn bộ:
○  Vé máy bay khứ hồi Việt Nam – Nhật Bản.
○  Chi phí đi lại phục vụ công việc.
○  Chi phí nhà ở trong thời gian OJT.
Ngoài ra
●  Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, thân thiện.
●  Cơ hội làm việc trực tiếp với khách hàng Nhật Bản.
●  Được đào tạo tiếng Nhật và kỹ năng chuyên môn.
●  Cơ hội phát triển nghề nghiệp rõ ràng.
●  Tham gia đầy đủ các chế độ theo quy định của pháp luật Việt Nam.

title: DB2402 - PHP Backend Developer (API, MySQL)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Về vị trí này
Designbook là công ty Hàn Quốc chuyên cung cấp giải pháp E-commerce Development với hơn 12 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực xây dựng và phát triển website thương mại điện tử.
Chúng tôi cung cấp dịch vụ trọn gói từ:
- E-commerce Planning
- UI/UX Design
- Front-end Publishing
- Back-end Development
Đội ngũ của Designbook sở hữu năng lực triển khai toàn bộ quy trình nội bộ, được chứng nhận Corporate Research Institute, Venture Company và Women-owned Business, đồng thời là đối tác lâu năm của nhiều thương hiệu lớn tại Hàn Quốc.
Trách nhiệm
- Phát triển và bảo trì hệ thống Backend cho các website thương mại điện tử.
- Phát triển tính năng mới trên nền tảng Godo Mall.
- Tích hợp API với các hệ thống bên thứ ba.
- Tối ưu hiệu năng hệ thống.
- Phối hợp cùng Front-end và Designer để triển khai dự án.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Yêu cầu
- Có tối thiểu 01 năm kinh nghiệm lập trình PHP.
- Có kinh nghiệm phát triển Backend Website.
- Hiểu cơ sở dữ liệu MySQL.
- Có kinh nghiệm tích hợp API.
Điều kiện bắt buộc
Do thường xuyên làm việc trực tiếp với đội ngũ tại Hàn Quốc, vị trí Backend yêu cầu ứng viên có khả năng giao tiếp bằng tiếng Hàn.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Quyền lợi
- Làm việc trực tiếp với công ty công nghệ Hàn Quốc.
- Tham gia các dự án E-commerce quy mô lớn cho nhiều thương hiệu nổi tiếng.
- Được đào tạo về nền tảng Cafe24 và Godo Mall.
- Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, quy trình phát triển rõ ràng.
- Cơ hội phát triển chuyên môn trong lĩnh vực E-commerce.
- Làm việc cùng đội ngũ có nhiều năm kinh nghiệm trong Planning, Design, Publishing và Development.

title: Technical Leader (PHP/ReactJS)
description:

PHP/Laravel

ReactJS / NextJS / React Native

Design and review 
application architecture, RESTful APIs, database structures, caching strategies, and infrastructure solutions

Define and enforce engineering standards, coding guidelines, design principles, testing practices, documentation, and deployment processes across development teams.
Oversee 
cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, logging, release management, and production environments

Manage and optimize services on 
AWS, Cloudflare, Docker
, and support incident response, root cause analysis, troubleshooting, and continuous improvement of production systems.

Collaborate closely with

10+ years
 of software development experience, including strong expertise in

.
At least 
3 years
 of experience as a

.

backend, frontend, and infrastructure

title: Lead Python Engineer
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Itviec’s client 
is
 
seeking 
to join our Service Operations team, with a strong focus on Python development, automation, scripting, technical leadership, and DevOps practices.
 
Key responsibilities:
Lead the design, development, maintenance, and enhancement of Python-based applications, automation tools, scripts, and utilities.
Provide technical leadership and guidance to engineers, including code reviews, solution design, troubleshooting, and best-practice adoption.
Design and implement automation scripts to support testing, monitoring, deployment, and operational workflows.
Build and maintain automation test scripts using Python and related frameworks.
Support backend service development, API integration, and internal tooling using Python.
Collaborate with development, QA, DevOps, and operations teams to define technical approaches and ensure effective delivery.
Drive improvements in code quality, maintainability, reliability, scalability, and performance.
Integrate automated scripts and tools into CI/CD pipelines, such as GitHub Actions or similar platforms.
Support DevOps-related activities, including build, deployment, release automation, and environment configuration.
Work with containerized environments using Docker and Kubernetes.
Collaborate with infrastructure and DevOps teams to support deployment and operations in cloud-native environments.
Troubleshoot application, automation, and deployment issues across development, test, and production-like environments.
Contribute to technical documentation, coding standards, automation guidelines, and continuous improvement initiatives.
Support team planning, task breakdown, technical estimation, and delivery coordination in Agile/DevOps environments.
Mentor and coach team members, helping them grow their technical capabilities and follow engineering best practices.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


7+ years of hands-on experience in Python development, with at least 1–2 years in a technical lead, senior engineer, or similar leadership role.
Strong Python coding capability, including scripting, automation, backend development, and API integration.
Experience leading technical discussions, reviewing code, guiding solution design, and supporting engineering teams.
Experience in automation testing or test script development using Python.
Good understanding of software engineering practices, clean code, debugging, maintainability, and performance optimization.
Experience working with CI/CD pipelines, preferably GitHub Actions or similar tools.
Practical experience with Docker and Kubernetes.
Familiarity with Linux environments and shell scripting.
Experience working with REST APIs and service integration.
Good understanding of cloud-native application environments.
Experience working in Agile/DevOps teams.
Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
Good communication skills and ability to collaborate with development, QA, DevOps, operations, and infrastructure teams.
Ability to mentor engineers, coordinate technical work, and support delivery across cross-functional teams.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Our client is 
an AI-centric global digital transformation company. We design advanced data and AI transformation solutions, modernize technology architectures and develop next-generation core systems for industry leaders in Banking, Insurance, Manufacturing and Robotics
 
HR benefits
Competitive salary
Salary band per level are reviewed once per year
13th month salary pro rata depending on the employee’s length of service (within a calender year), paid with the December salary
Monthly lunch allowance: 700,000 VND/employee
Parking: covers the monthly parking fee for employee motorbikes
Health care
Private health insurance: including accident, outpatient, in-patient, maternity, and dental for all permanent employees who pass 2-month probation.
Optical: expense claim for eyewear
Annual health check-ups.
Vacation
Maximum 18-day vacation leave/year (with the ability to carry over 05 days till 31st March of the following year)
Adding one more annual leave day for each two-year anniversary.
Healthy lifestyle
Sports and hobby clubs: company has an annual fund for fitness activities, which is allocated per month as team’s vote.
Range of healthy snacks, tea, coffee, milk and beer on tap

title: Junior iOS Mobile Developer (Swift, English)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


1. Education
● Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field.
● Final-year students or fresh graduates with strong iOS project portfolios are also welcome to apply.
2. Responsibilities
● Design, build, and maintain advanced features for the Motorist iOS app using Swift 5+, UIKit, and SwiftUI.
● Apply VIPER/MVVM architectures to ensure modular, testable, and scalable code.
● Apply reactive programming with RxSwift, Combine, and RxCocoa for event-driven features.
● Integrate Firebase SDK (Firestore, Remote Config, Crashlytics) for data, feature toggling, and app stability.
● Handle app life cycle events (background, foreground, terminated states) to ensure smooth user experiences.
● Work with RxSwift, RxCocoa, and RxRealm for reactive programming and event handling.
● Integrate APIs using Alamofire, ObjectMapper.
● Manage secure data and credentials using Locksmith and RealmSwift.
● Collaborate closely with backend developers, designers, and QA testers to ensure smooth, reliable, and scalable app performance.
● Debug, refactor, and continuously optimize the app for performance and user satisfaction.
● Participate in code reviews, sprint planning, and technical discussions to share knowledge and improve team efficiency.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Technical Experiences
Must Have
● Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field.
● Solid understanding of Swift, Xcode, and iOS SDK fundamentals.
● Familiar with VIPER/MVVM architecture, SOLID principles, OOP, and data structures.
● Experience working with databases such as RealmSwift or Core Data.
● Understanding of RESTful API integration and JSON data handling.
● Proficient understanding of code version control tools, such as Git.
● Strong attention to detail and analytical problem-solving mindset.
Nice to Have
● Exposure to SwiftUI, Combine, or Reactive Programming (RxSwift / RxCocoa).
● Familiarity with Firebase SDK (Firestore, Remote Config, Crashlytics).
● Experience with CoreLocation, Google Maps SDK.
● Appreciation for clean, maintainable, and well-structured code.
● Collaborative mindset and a reliable team player who takes ownership of their work.
Language Skills
● Able to communicate and collaborate in English (written and spoken).
● Willing to learn and improve communication when working with Singapore HQ and other markets.
Flexible Points
We welcome engineers who:
● Are passionate about iOS development and eager to grow in a professional environment.
● May not have long working experience but can demonstrate strong technical fundamentals and self-learning ability.
● Want to master VIPER architecture, Reactive Programming, and Swift best practices.
● Are not yet fluent in English but are motivated to practice and improve daily.
● Enjoy solving complex problems and building high-quality apps that users love.
Notice
Candidates are required to provide reference information after passing the interview round.
At 
Motorist
, we believe in 
work hard, play hard.
 You’ll be part of an energetic and collaborative team that encourages creativity, learning, and ownership.
Join us to grow your career and help build one of Singapore’s leading automotive platforms.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


● Competitive salary with annual performance review and 13th-month bonus.
● Modern working devices: MacBook, monitor, iPhone test devices, etc.
● PVI Health Insurance and full social insurance as per Vietnam Labor Law.
● 15 days annual leave, increasing by 1 day per year.
● English language training sponsored by the company.
● Professional development and opportunities to travel to Singapore for training.
● Friendly, innovative, and young working environment in District 2, Ho Chi Minh City.
● Working hours: 7 hours/day, Monday to Friday (no weekends).
● Year-end party and team-building activities.
● Unlimited potential for career growth and internal advancement.

title: IOS Developer
company: Ngân hàng TMCP Phương Đông | OCB
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Job description
We are on a journey to modernize our digital banking platform. We aren't just maintaining code; we are re-engineering it for speed, scale, and security. We are looking for experienced mobile engineers enjoys solving complex technical challenges and wants to have a direct influence on the architecture of a real-world banking application.
 
 Modernize & Optimize: Lead the transition to cleaner, modularized code. Improve app performance, responsiveness, and memory management.
 Build the Future: Design and implement new, user-centric features that make banking easier for millions of customers.
 Engineering Excellence: Champion best practices through code reviews, automated testing, and proactive refactoring of legacy components
 Collaborate: Partner closely with Backend, Product, and UX/UI teams to turn business needs into high-performance technical solutions.
Solve Problems: Tackle production challenges head-on, ensuring our platform is stable, secure, and reliable.
 
Your skills and experience
Different projects and squads may focus on different technical domains. Candidates with strengths in relevant areas will be considered for suitable engineering teams across our banking technology ecosystem.
 
1. Engineering Rigor & Quality
•    Testing Culture: Hands-on experience writing Unit Tests, Automated UI Tests, and API Mocks/Stubs. You prioritize testable code over "quick fixes."
•    Code Health: Deep application of SOLID, YAGNI, and KISS principles. Strict adherence to coding conventions and documentation standards.
•    Performance: Proven ability to identify and resolve bottlenecks using platform profiling tools (e.g., Instruments, Android Profiler). Experience with threading and complex offline data synchronization.
2. Banking-Grade Security & Integration
•    Security (Critical): Strong knowledge of secure mobile practices: Certificate Pinning, secure storage mechanisms (Keychain/Keystore), biometric authentication (FaceID/TouchID/ Fingerprint), and obfuscation techniques.
•    API Orchestration: Deep understanding of RESTful API lifecycle, request/response cycle management, and handling token-based authentication flows in a secure environment.
•    Ecosystem: Experience integrating and maintaining 3rd-party SDKs (e.g., Firebase, Analytics, Marketing tools like AppsFlyer, and UI frameworks like SnapKit/libraries across Android and iOS ecosystems).
3. Workflow & Tools:
•    DevOps/Collaboration: Daily usage of Git/GitLab and Jira/Redmine. You are comfortable with branching strategies (GitFlow/Trunk-based), code review workflows, and CI/CD practices.
•    Design-to-Code: High proficiency in interpreting complex Figma designs, ensuring pixel-perfect responsiveness across all device screen sizes and OS versions.
4. Strategic & "Plus" Skills
•    Technical Leadership: Ability to mentor junior developers, perform deep code reviews, and drive architectural decisions.
•    Future-Proofing: Experience or strong interest in Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) for cross-platform logic sharing.
•    Continuous Learning: A proactive mindset to evaluate, prototype, and implement new mobile methodologies to improve the development lifecycle.
•    AI-SDLC: Experience in leverage AI tools in product development activities.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Job description


Job description
We are on a journey to modernize our digital banking platform. We aren't just maintaining code; we are re-engineering it for speed, scale, and security. We are looking for experienced mobile engineers enjoys solving complex technical challenges and wants to have a direct influence on the architecture of a real-world banking application.
 
 Modernize & Optimize: Lead the transition to cleaner, modularized code. Improve app performance, responsiveness, and memory management.

 Engineering Excellence: Champion best practices through code reviews, automated testing, and proactive refactoring of legacy components
 Collaborate: Partner closely with Backend, Product, and UX/UI teams to turn business needs into high-performance technical solutions.
Solve Problems: Tackle production challenges head-on, ensuring our platform is stable, secure, and reliable.
 
Your skills and experience
Different projects and squads may focus on different technical domains. Candidates with strengths in relevant areas will be considered for suitable engineering teams across our banking technology ecosystem.
 
1. Engineering Rigor & Quality
•    Testing Culture: Hands-on experience writing Unit Tests, Automated UI Tests, and API Mocks/Stubs. You prioritize testable code over "quick fixes."
•    Code Health: Deep application of SOLID, YAGNI, and KISS principles. Strict adherence to coding conventions and documentation standards.
•    Performance: Proven ability to identify and resolve bottlenecks using platform profiling tools (e.g., Instruments, Android Profiler). Experience with threading and complex offline data synchronization.
2. Banking-Grade Security & Integration
•    Security (Critical): Strong knowledge of secure mobile practices: Certificate Pinning, secure storage mechanisms (Keychain/Keystore), biometric authentication (FaceID/TouchID/ Fingerprint), and obfuscation techniques.
•    API Orchestration: Deep understanding of RESTful API lifecycle, request/response cycle management, and handling token-based authentication flows in a secure environment.
•    Ecosystem: Experience integrating and maintaining 3rd-party SDKs (e.g., Firebase, Analytics, Marketing tools like AppsFlyer, and UI frameworks like SnapKit/libraries across Android and iOS ecosystems).

•    Design-to-Code: High proficiency in interpreting complex Figma designs, ensuring pixel-perfect responsiveness across all device screen sizes and OS versions.
4. Strategic & "Plus" Skills

•    Future-Proofing: Experience or strong interest in Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) for cross-platform logic sharing.
•    Continuous Learning: A proactive mindset to evaluate, prototype, and implement new mobile methodologies to improve the development lifecycle.
•    AI-SDLC: Experience in leverage AI tools in product development activities.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


-    100% salary during probation
-    13th month salary and year-end bonus based on business performance (1–3.5 months’ salary)
-    Competitive total compensation, commensurate with experience and capability
-    Annual salary review based on performance
-    Bonus and benefits in accordance with the Bank’s policies
-    Eligibility for preferential loan programs for employees
-    Health insurance card covering inpatient and outpatient medical care (as per policy)
-    Professional working environment with deep technical specialization and long-term career development
-    Opportunity to participate in large-scale technology projects in the banking and finance domain
-    Exposure to core banking systems, large-scale data, and high-security environments
-    Regular internal training programs in technical expertise, banking knowledge, and soft skills

title: Mid/Sr Java Developer (English Required) - Up to 3200$
description:

title: Senior Android Engineer (Kotlin/ Java)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Join
 ZALORA
's dynamic mobile team and play a crucial role in shaping the future of our e-commerce platform by creating an exceptional Android app experience for our users. As a valued team member, you'll be part of the Post Purchase squad dedicated to enhancing the user experience after placing an order. You will collaborate with cross-functional squads, including members with diverse technical domain knowledge, to develop and enhance innovative features that provide a seamless and enjoyable shopping experience for millions of ZALORA customers. Our app combines Kotlin and Java, with all new code written in Kotlin. We're transitioning to an architecture that promotes increased testability while maintaining the exceptional stability our app is known for. 
 
Our app combines Kotlin and Java, with all new code written in Kotlin. We're transitioning to an 
architecture that promotes increased testability while maintaining the exceptional stability our app is 
known for.
 
Responsibilities
Work closely with cross-functional teams, including Product, UX Research, and members  from various technical domains, to design and develop features for the Android platform
Contribute to the development and enhancement of ZALORA's post-purchase experience, ensuring users enjoy a smooth and satisfying journey after their purchase.
Build high-performance, well-structured native apps that incorporate modern Android best practices.
Ensure the optimal performance, quality, and responsiveness of our Android app.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


B.S. or M.S. in Computer Science or equivalent experience.
+5 years proficiency in Kotlin, Android Jetpack, Coroutine Flow, Dagger, unit test.
Exceptional problem-solving, critical thinking, and communication skills.
Experience with offline storage, concurrency, threading, and performance tuning.
Adept at benchmarking and optimization.
Familiarity with the general mobile landscape, architectures (MVVM or Clean architecture, multi-module), trends, and emerging technologies (Jetpack Compose).
Solid understanding of the complete mobile development life cycle and design patterns 
(OOP, SOLID).
Bonus: Experience with CI/CD, automation tools, static code analysis or functional programming.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


The unique opportunity to have a serious impact on a growing organisation
A dynamic working environment shaping the face of fashion e-commerce in growth markets
Work closely with a global talent pool with international mindset 
Best practice scaled agile engineering
Amazing office and great culture! Massage chairs, table tennis, video game room, quarterly team events, yearly company trip, end of the year party
Hybrid working environment.
Clear career progression plan and support
Macbook or laptop when you start
Social insurance, medical insurance & health insurance
13th month salary
15 days of annual leave, 30 days of sick leave/mental health, 1 day of occasion leave
